204: The Dwadasamsa (1/12th) of the Paramayu (120 years) is equal to Sandhya. The sequence of the Ascendant and other signs constitute Sandhya Dasa; each being of 10 years. (1/12th of 120 years = 10 years). 

Notes: In Chapter 5 of the volume-1, the life span (Paramayu) of a person is 120 years and the Dwadasamsa (1/12th) is equal to 10 years. The first Dasa of 10 yrs. will that be of a planet posited in the Ascendant, followed by the Dasa of planet in 2nd house also of 10 yrs. and in the same manner, the Dasas of the other planets are determined. 

# 31. Pachaka Dasa of Sandhya Dasa

205-206 : Multiple Sandhya Dasa by 6 and divide it by 31. The resultant value (in terms of year etc.) be kept in first column and 

$\frac{1}{2}$ part of it be entered in the next three columns. The rest of the eight columns be filled with the figure 1/3rd of the resultant value. In this manner, the Pachaka in Sandhya Dasa be conceptualised. 

# Notes:

The natural Sandhya Dasa is of 10 years duration. If we multiply it by 6 and then divide it by 31, the resultant will be 1 yr.-11 months-6 days. This period be kept in the first column. Half of this value, turns out to be 0 yr. 11 months, 18 days and this figure will go in the next three columns. The next 8 coloumns will carry the figure equivalent to 1/3rd of the resultant value i.e. 0 yr. 7 months 22 days. The pattern of the Dasas of the 12 signs is illustrated in the tabular form as under; taking the Ascendant as Capricorn from the standard horoscope.

207-209 : Some exponents of the astrology have been considering Tara Dasa like Vimshottari Dasa. In place of the Sun, 

the Moon, Mars etc., Tara Dasa of Janma, Sampat etc. are reckoned. Commencing from the strongest planet amongst the planets tenanted in the Angles, the sequence of Janma, Sampat, Vipat, Kshema, Pratyak, Sadhana, Naidhara, Mitra and Paramitra Dasas are adopted. O Vipra! The effect of Tara Dasas will be in accordance to their nomenclature. This Dasa system will be applicable only to those nativities where the planets are posited in the Angles. In the event of more than one planets in the Angles, the commencement of Dasa sequence will be from the strongest amongst them. 

e 1 1 

210: O Brahmin! I have since acquainted you with the intricacies of the various type of Dasa systems. I would explain the effects of their Antradasas at a later stage. 

# 阿雅 1

# Chapter - 49

# RESULTS OF THE DASAS

# Jyutatahch kuhgha aodada dhyaana  ch mya yu ne  !I   
fLeT Ch KooDrua tlaas taoya me teoohytaa? I I I I

1: Maitreya said; O Venerable Said! I am enlightened with the various types of Dasas. Kindly apprise me with the nature of their results. 

# Sahararaan 1

2: Sage Parasara said : - O Vipra ! Dasas emanate two types of results, one of general nature and two, of pronounced nature which correspondsto the natural characteristics and acquired position (in the horoscope) of the planets. 

# Braahvaiyamunu taere ng  kafan  ooy dharayu  ch   
Aaraddekaganggo  keot  dharayarmas  fak  vveetl | 13 |   
Dhagamsh  fak  vachm  mchdokaganggo  kgo   
Jnnt  fak  tuotiyas  cakat t  ch  qkgo | |

3-4: The results of the Dasas of the planets be ascertained on the basis of the strength of the planets. The planet in the first 

Drekkana, gives results in the beginning of the Dasa, in the second Drekkana, in the middle of the Dasa and in the third Drekkana, in the concluding part of the Dasa. The results of the retrograde planets be considered in the reverse order. 

Notes: The consequential effects of planets that of natural characteristic and placement in the horoscope, be felt in the three different segments of the Dasa. If the planets are posited between $0^{\circ}$ and $10^{\circ}$ , the effects be considered in the first segment (part) of the Dasa (1/3rd Dasa) and between $10^{\circ}$ s and $20^{\circ}$ s, in the second (middle) segment and between $20^{\circ}$ and $30^{\circ}$ in the third (last) segment of the Dasa. However, if the planet is in retrogression, including the Dasa of Rahu and Ketu, the results of the first segment of the Dasa will be felt and the result of planet in the first Drekkana will be considered. 

dhrarreee dhrarreee rre eae 14 11 

5-6: In the event of the lord of the Dasa being in the Ascendant, having benefic aspects, conjunct with the benefic planets, exalted, in own sign or in the friendly sign, favourable results will be felt in the beginning of the Dasa. If the planet is posited in the 6th, 8th or 12th house, debilitated, in imimical sign or combust, the result will be unfavourable. Now I narrate the results of the Dasas. 

Notes: To comprehend the efficacy of the Dasas explicitly, some other astrological principles, aphorisms, maxims, are cited as under : 

i) The transit of the lord of Mahadasa (main period) on a particular sign, renders specific effects on the house of such sign. 

ii) The house aspected by its lord, promises favourable results during the Mahadasa of the said planet. 

iii) Every planet during the currency of the first half of its Mahadasa gives result of the house next to the Ascendant and in the 2nd half, the result of the house 2nd from the Ascendant will be prominent. 

iv) The 4th Mahadasa from birth, if happened to be of Saturn or the 6th of Jupiter or the 5th Mahadasa of Rahu or Mars, these Dasas become unfavourable, despite the fact, the planet is benefic or Yogkaraka. 

v) Venus posited in the 12th house promises good results in its Mahadasa, even though aspected by or conjunct with the malefics 

vi) The Mahadasa of the most powerful planet being in the highest point of exaltation at the time of birth is considered 'par-excellence' and surges magnificent resultsviz, accretion of wealth, sound health, splendid comforts etc. 

vii) The Dasa of the Planet moving toward its exaltation point, is called 'Ahrohini' Dasa. This Dasa is auspicious and springs happiness. In case, planet heads towards debilitation or acquires inimical Navamsa, the Dasa of such planet will be inauspicious and will mitigates the benefic results. 

viii) The Dasa of a planet after attainment of the exaltation point moves towards debilitation, is called 'Avrohini' Dasa. This Dasa brings unhappy events. If this planet is posited in own, friendly or exaltation sign, the effect of the Dasa is of mediocre nature. 

ix) The planet acquires strength in Shada Bala if located in the exaltation sign, and the Dasa of such planet is called 'Poorna' Dasa. During the currency of this Dasa, the native is betowed with wealth and status. 

x) The planet which is weak at birth and placed in the debilitation sign, the Dasa of such planet is termed as 'Rikta' Dasa (defunct). The native faces losses during this Dasa. 

xi). The Dasa of a planet which is placed at the lowest point of debilitation or in the enemy's Navamsa, or in the inimical sign, is called as 'Arishta' Dasa (period of misfortune). In this Dasa, loss of wealth, comforts and health be anticipated. 

xii) The planet posited in exaltation, own or friendly sign at the time of birth but has gone in inimical sign or in sign of debilitation in the Navamsa, the Dasa of such planet will render favourable results in the second half and mixed 

results in the first half. This Dasa is known as 'Mishrhta' (mixed) Dasa. 

xiii) At the time of birth, if any planet is in the inimical or debilitated sign and acquires the same Navamsa, the Dasa of such planet is called "Kashta" Dasa. In this Dasa the native suffers loss of wealth and loses his health. 

xiv) The Dasa of a planet which at the time of birth is in the friendly, own or exaltation on Mooltrikona signs or Vargas, is called 'Shubha' Dasa. In this Dasa, excellent results could be expected. 

xv) The Avrohini Dasa ushers most inauspicious and unfavourable results when Dasalord is posited in an inimical or debilitation sign or in the Navamsa of the same signs. 

xvi) The Dasa of the planet which is found in retrogaression at the time of birth, results in demotion, humiliation, disgrace obstacles, failures and loss of happiness. 

xvii) The Dasa of a planet having longitude equivalent to the longitude of the house (Bhava-Madhya) renders favourable results. 

xviii) The planet's Dasa with high benefic lines in Ashtaka Varga is also favourable. 

xix) The Dasa of a planet if powerful in the Shada Bala, signifies favourable events. 

xx) The planet in the last degree of the sign (Rashi-Anta) produces unfavourable results during its Dasa. 

xxi) If the longitude of a planet falls at the junction of the two houses (Bhava-Sandhi), the result of the Dasa of such a planet is considered not good. 

xxii) The Dasa of a planet which acquires less number of benefic lines in Ashtakavarga also produces unfavourable results. 

xxiii) The lord of the sign having 'Mandi' in it, does not give good results during its Dasa. 

xxiv) There are four most important 'Balas' (strength) of planet. These are Sthana, Chesta, Kala and Driga Balas. If a planet acquires strength through all these four Balas, is only then considered powerful and in the absence of adequate 

strength contributed by these four Balas, the planet is rendered weak. If a planet armed with the strength from these four 'Balas' and posited in the fifth house, it will acquire the potentiality of producing par excellent (Sumpooma) results. If it has power i) from three Balas, three fourth, ii) from two Balas, one half and iii) one Bala, one fourth of the "Sumpooma" results could be predicted. 

# VIMSHOTTARI MAHADASAS

# Results during the Mahadasa of the Sun :

Munlalnirikko ng 5kshofoe 5hoaovce yba Pparmaolnoygo!   
Knehrnirikko palaLamkcty  margayka maiahnyuotie | 19 |   
Suluy  kaltasmaayukutne  nnilajvagbaluyuotie!   
Talimnndaye mahltu saozky dghanlalmasadidek k yummu | C |   
Zaltaynt r aaiasmanmamnarnamnauadoky aayamaik  yammu   
Uulaltaiahikpansamayukot e pyraklalamg ch vniudatil | 19 |   
Dhnonaraych  ch saegkng  gajaaonrtyaaymaiaadiyraoul |   
Vahehnanaiahikpansamabnnn  bavahgnnayklalamkutl | 190 |   
Nupalalululutcivlralatack:  sebnnaaag: Nurc|   
Baalvalaahinllalaaeeydahayagaanai nae: | 199 | 

7-11: At the time of birth, the Sun if, posited in the Moolatrikona, own or exalted sign and occupies Angles (Kendras), Trines (Trikonas) or 11th house and conjunct with the lords of 9th or 10th house and also powerful and in his own Vargas (Divisions), during the Dasa of the Sun the native acquires lots of comforts and happiness. This Dasa is also favourable for the gain of wealth and profit earning activities. This ushers the time during which high status (position) is conferred by the king (Government/authorities/ employer), acquisition of conveyance etc. If the Sun is conjunct with the lord of the 5th house, birth of son; with 11th lord, comforts of elephant (costly vehicles); with 4th lord, gain of three vehicles, wealth, ministership with the blessing of the king (authorities) etc. are attained. In the Dasa of the strong Sun, the native acquires power (authority), conveyance etc. 

Notes: In accordance to Vimsottari Dasa system, the Mahadasa of the Sun is of six years duration. At the beginning of the Mahadasa of the Sun, the native receives results akin to the signification of the Sun. The nature of the Sun depends upon the condition in which it is placed in the sign. Besides, the position of the house occupied by the Sun is also of great importance and has a bearing in the signification of the events. 

The Sun is a vehicle of energy and it radiates intense power in life. To instil confidence, purity of mind, pride, bodily energy, high attainments etc., are some of the natural characteristics of the Sun. Consequently, the native observes, the following effects during the operation of the Mahadasa of the Sun : 

i) The disappointments get over, confidence gets infused, purity of thoughts springs up. 

ii) Native gets energetic and exalted. 

iii) The native may not have a mind to influence the other person, but the person automatically gets impressed. 

iv) Emergence of royal feelings and native do get the blessings of the authorities (king) in some form or the other. 

v) During the Mahadasa of the Sun, the native would like to undertake assignments, jobs, ventures etc; of large dimensions. 

vi) Native acquires sound health. 

In the other Astrological works propounded by great Sages or the Savant of Astrology dipict similar kind of results in the Mahadasa of the Sun as contained in Birhat Parasara Hora Sastra. Kalidasaa in his Uttarakalamrit observed, as follows : 

"In the Sun's Dasa, if the Sun be auspicious to the native, it will give children, intelligence, wisdom, high status and power, knowledge, wealth, fame, valour, happiness and divine favour in its Dasa". 

The version of Phala Deepika' in this respect is as follows: 

"If the Sun is auspicious, native will accumulate wealth through his proficiency, through travels, kings and battles (disputes). The native wanders in jungles and mountains, attains fame and becomes industrious, the native develops sharpness in his nature and in his work and also gains success, comforts etc." 

Savant Kalyana Varma in his Saravali records the following effects of Sun's Mahadasa : 

"In the auspicious Mahadasa of the Sun, the native will profit from new medicines, development of roads (routines), chemicals supplies, forest, evil friendship, hunting, skin, fiery things, king's atrocities and battles, etc., besides, gain of wealth and commendation from the king. patience, persistent efforts, valour, prestige, elevation of fame, brilliance and kingly comforts are achieved !! 

# Inauspicious results of the Sun's Mahadasa :

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/d2e65f06b60b9504365d6eef5f6f67c99e678fbc471b6591bde535d0ecd3d7cf.jpg)


12-15: If the Sun is weak by his position in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house, sign of debilitation, conjunct with the malefics, Rahu or Ketu or with the lords of the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house, during the operation of the Dasa, intense miseries, loss of wealth and fame, living in foreign land, punishment by the Sovereign (Government/authorities), money crunch, pains of illness, defame, confrontation with brothers and friends, fear of father's death, and other kind of unfavourable results are felt. In this duration, mental agony of the parents and native also encounters unjustified wrath of public. If weak Sun has aspect or company of the benefic planets, native at times, gets happy events but if there is only malefic influence, the learned astrologers shall always predict unfavourable results. 

Notes: According to the Sage, the outcome of unfavourable results during the progress of the Dasa of any planet, the following 

situations should essentially exist! 

i) Planets occupying the sign of debilitation 

ii) Planets posited in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house 

iii) Planets are radically weak 

iv) Planets having conjunction with Rahu or Ketu or with the lords of the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house. 

The debilitated Sun gives sudden effects, such as fracture of the bones, eruption of sudden fever. In this currency of Dasa the native loses his confidence, If the Sun is not in the state of debilitation but otherwise badly placed, in his Dasa, the native faces the bad period boldly and puts his best efforts to overcome it. In case the Sun being the lord of the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house and also posited in one of these houses, the adverse results are not noticed, because the Sun perforce has to give effects of Viprita Rajayoga. Under these circumstances, the more the malefic influences, on the Sun, the more it goes in favour of the native. 

# Results during the Mahadasa of the Moon :

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/baa0ec3f1372ac04824519a5afa6f6a4a4c36dd68a801913e866bd5e7f587a79.jpg)


16-22: O Brahmin! After briefly describing the results of the Dasa of the Sun, now I explain the results of the Moon's Dasa in accordance to Vimsottari Dasa system. If the Moon is in the sign 

of exaltation, own sign, in Kendras (Angles) or Trikonas (Trines) and conjoined with the benefic planets, full moon, powerful and accompanied by the lord of the 10th, the 9th or the 4th house, during the Dasa of the Moon, beginning till the end, happiness, enjoyment, auspiciousness would prevail. Gain in wealth and agriculture produce, many auspicious ceremonies at home, comforts of conveyance, meeting with the king, success at works, blessing of goddess Laxami enhancement of fortune through Royalty and friends and state of extreme enjoyment are achieved. Acquisition of conveyance and white garments, happiness of having a son, addition of cows in the house etc., are the other benefits native would reap during this period. 

If the Moon is posited in the 11th house and is also in her own sign or in the sign of exaltation, gain of wealth in its assorted forms, accretion in fortune, happiness and education and also Royal commendation are likely to be bestowed during this period. 

Notes: The Moon is Karaka of happiness. Therefore, Maharishi perceives state of extreme happiness in the auspicious and favourable positions of the Moon. In the natural horoscope, the Moon is also Karaka of vehicle (any kind of conveyance) and animals. Therefore, comforts of vehicles and (wealth of) cows is enhanced during this period. The Moon is also Karaka of 'Mare' (female horse) as such Rishi points out Ratha (chariot) though the tradition of chariot is no longer in existence in the modern age. The horse driven vehicle is a passenger carrier and hence it can be compared with the similar type of vehicle of the modern time. 

The Bombay's edition of this treatise, states that in the major period of the Moon, the results like, warmth of the mother, house, garden, tank etc., status in the society, elegant conveyance, marriage in the house and other related auspicious functions, success in business, accomplishment of venture, fortune uplift with the blessings of preceptor and friends and pitfall-gains are generally felt. 

The effects of the Moon's Dasa enunciated in the publication of M/s. Thakur Prashad & Sons are almost identical. Rise in the fortune (status) is an additional effect which it has recorded - along with one extra Shloka which states. 

"The Moon duly influenced by the lords of 10th and 9th houses duly conjunct with the 4th lord, gives effect to rise in fortune and gain in wealth and health". 

In the above Shloka, these particular results are obtained only in the combination of the Moon with the Yoga Karaka a planets. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/fbd583c0f1623bd9a6f1270299b37e5153c27fb75a5d6f0e99d47a4ba6168bd7.jpg)


23-26: If the Moon is in the sign of debilitation and powerless being in Krishna Pakasha, in the Dasa of such Moon, there will be gain in wealth. In case, the powerful Moon is in the 3rd house, fluctuating effects, at times, comforts and at time, gain in wealth are felt. Having conjunct with the malefic planets, the weak Moon sets in sluggish feeling, mental derangement, trouble in service, loss of wealth and intense trouble (death like) from the maternal relations. If the same weak Moon is posited in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house, (Trik Houses), blame from the authorities (King), mental tension, loss of wealth and health, conflict with mother, enertness, mental depression etc., will also cause during the Dasa. If the Moon is posited in Trik houses (6th, 8th or 12th) but powerful, mixed results of gain in wealth, happiness or bodily pains etc., will be felt intermittently. 

Notes: The Moon has intense relation with the mind. The Moon regulates efficacy of the mind. It is for these very reasons, Maharishi Parasara, related the results of the weak Moon with different state of mind those are felt during the major period of the said Moon. The major symptoms of Moon's affliction are sulgiginess, inertness, uneasiness, mental aberrations etc. The Bombay's Edition of Birhat Parasara Hora 

Sastra deposes the malefic effects of the afflicted Moon during its Dasa such as, loss of wealth, poverty, wretchedness, miseries, phlegmatic diseases, shivering fever etc.

27-32: Now I narrate the auspicious and inauspicious results of the Dasa of Mars consequential to its placement in exaltation or own signs or in debilitated or nomical sign. If Mars is in deep exaltation, exalted sign, Mooltrikona sign, own sign, Angle or Trine houses, the 11th or the 2nd house and also with full strength, in conjunction with and aspected by the benefic planets and posited in benefic Navamsa, the Dasa will result in gain in wealth and agriculture produce, benefit from the Sovereign (Government, emp'cyer etc.). Felicitations from the Sovereign, acquisition conveyance, apparels, jewellery etc., dwelling in the foreign land, warmth and compassion from brothers (co-borns) is also attained. Strong Mars placed in the 3rd or Angle houses, gives wealth earned through sustained struggle, victory over enemies etc. In the beginning of the Dasa comforts from wife, son, status and Royal felicitation is felt. However, some difficult time towards the end of the Dasa may also be expected. 

Notes: The Edition of Bombay indicates some additional results such as, the major period of Mars ushers wisdom, tension free mind, valour 

etc., and the native constructs pond. 

Mars becomes strong if posited in the auspicious houses, and it instils fiery nature in the native. He also gets courage, firmness and patience. Besides, urge of creativity is also felt during this period. In other words, whatever task the native accomplishes during the Dasa of Mars, it is purely due to his personal efforts, struggle and virility. 

Nanovahadidehokmabavshoy 00n 2alvivbajotepaapuyukotepapuyuotse saaee 

33: Mars, if in the sign of debilitation, located in the inauspicious houses, powerless, conjunct or aspected by the malefic planets, the Dasa of Mars will give bad and unfavourable results. 

Notes: Here Maharishi gave a mere indication of unfavourable results during the Dasa of afflicted and badly placed Mars in the nativity. In this respect, Bombay Edition contains a half the Shloka. 

"ppaepo  oamkazaritde ch kalah cheyaginb-  aegpamakshieiog mahayapaiiednokj:  oomkai t 

It means that if Mars is malefic, it sets in disease, trouble, some time theft, fire, imprisonment, injury, weak eyesight, displeasure from king (Government) etc. 

Other ancient works gave detailed account of the effects of the Dasa of malefic Mars. According to Jataka Parijataka, during the Dasa of afflicted Mars, the native suffers from bile, blood infection, painful fever, company of unchaste women, conflict with wife, disrespect to preceptor, friends and lack of affection for son and would consume bad food. 

Ancient Scholars viz., Kalidasa and Manteshwara expressed the same opinion. However, Savant Kalyan Verma's contention on this subject is at variance and according to him when the Dasa of the afflicted Mars is in progress, the native suffers from epilepsy, cuts and wounds and he tends to become arrogant, unethical and religious. 

# Results during Mahadasa of Rahu and Ketu :

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/728bb6ea95bcac5b7221ef3d901f967db9efebdb17a540ba15202cece71d6a69.jpg)


34-39-1/2: O Brahmin! Now I explain the signs etc., of Rahu and Ketu so that I can disclose the results of their Dasa before you. The exaltation signs of Rahu is Scorpio and for Ketu it is Taurus and the Moola Trikona signs are respectively Sagittarius and Gemini. Own sign of Rahu is Aquarius and of Ketu is Scorpio. Some have reckoned Virgo and Pisces signs respectively. If Rahu is exalted in the nativity, its Dasa will be extremely favourable and wealth, prosperity etc., is attained. Ambitions are accomplished through friends and king (Government), possibility of conveyance and son, construction of new residence, religious feelings, festivity, Royal recognition in the foreign land, decorative items, Jewellery etc., are also achieved. If Rahu is also aspected by and in conjunction with the benefic planets, posited in Angles, Trines the 11th or the 3rd house and with auspicious sign, property, land etc. and happiness is achieved with the blessing of king. Also recognition from the head of the family and welfare of house become possible. 

Notes: Rahu represents foreign and other religions. Therefore, in favourable time, the native makes profits from the sovereign and that too through a person of a different religion. 

Bombay's publication of the treatise cites some more results. Such as, the major period of Rahu, brings about beneficence, expansion of kingdom, spreading of religion, pilgrimage, higher knowledge and dominance. Travelling abroad is also stated to be on card.

40-43: If Rahu is posited in the 8th or the 12th house, the result of the Dasa is painful. If Rahu has connection with the malefic planets and is conjunct with 'Maraka' house, the result will be shifting of place, mental agony, death of wife and son, stale food etc. In the beginning of Dasa, physical stress and loss of wealth and agriculture produce, be expected and in the middle position of the Dasa, the native receives comforts and also wealth (profits) from the foreign countries. In the last portion of the Dasa, distress, change of place and mental stresses and strains will be felt. 

Notes: During the Dasa of afflicted Rahu, the native encounters - disappointments, irritation, injury, accidents, debts, negligence, theft, plundering, cheating, heavy expenditure, disease and ailments, offensive behaviours, suspicion, doubts, betrayal, etc.

45-48-1/2: If Jupiter, is posited in the exaltation sign, own sign, Angles (Kendras), Trines, the 11th house, Mooltrikona sign, own or exalted Navamsa, benefit from the Sovereign, felicitation from king (Government, authorities etc.), aesthetical happiness, comforts of elephants, horses, worship of God and Brahmins, affection from wife and son, vehicles and clothes be attained, success in Yagna (Vedanta) and ventures, listening of sermons on 'Vedanta', accomplishments with king's blessings, ushering of happiness, acquisition of 'Palaki' (vehicle), overall prosperity, pleasure of wife (marriage) and sons, gift of choiced food and fruits etc., be caused during the Dasa. 

Notes: Some particular effects of the Dasa of the benefic Jupiter planets recorded in the publications of Bombay are heavy accretion of wealth, entrusted with authority, increase in fortune, fame, over all qualitative improvement, hosts of servants, magnificence etc.

49-51: Jupiter, in case is in the sign of debilitation, conjunct with the malefic planets, posited in the 8th or the 12th house, the result will be change of house (residence), mental tension, grief from son, lurking fears, loss of wealth and animals, pilgrimage etc. Distress and then gain of animals, in the beginning of the Dasa and attainment of comforts, Royal commendations, magnificence etc. are caused towards the middle and the last portions of the Dasa. 

Notes: The additional results of the Dasa of Jupiter contained in the Bombay's publication are, physical distress, loss of patience, depletion of wealth and property (land), father in despair, lurking fear of theft etc. Native may face false blame or allegations in the Dasa of malefic Jupiter. 

# Results during the Mahadasa of Saturn :

Aey 5euy 2eotuy yooatitihin: Prkoiitil: I 

52: Now I unfold the result of the Saturn (Suryaputra) who is a most inferior and degraded amongst all the planets. 

slo 143 1

soknol 142 1

53-56: If Saturn is in the sign of exaltation, own sign, friendly sign, Mooltrikona, the 9th house, or in the Navamsa of the exaltation or own signs, the 3rd house, the 11th house, the native is bestowed with recognition from the king (Government), accretion of wealth, pleasure of literary discussions, elephant ride at the behest of the king, Jewellery etc., high status, commander of the army, monetary gains, splendid happiness. The native gains through authorities (Government), prosperity at home, marriage (wife), birth of son etc. 

Notes: In the natural horoscope, Saturn is the lord of 10th and 11th houses. 10th house represents authority (Government) and 11th house denotes profit, gains etc. Therefore, in the benefic placement of Saturn, the native, during the Dasa of Saturn, acquires wealth, status, business, education, success in ventures, governmental post etc. The 10th house also is related to festivals and hence it gives festivities and celebrations of such nature in which lots of presents etc. are received. The native helps others in their business activities through his contacts with the high authorities. He also makes some profit in this process. Some learned Astrologers take the 11th house for the birth of the child because the 11th house is the 5th from the 7th house (wife house). The Sage has said about 

the birth of child in the Saturn's Dasa in this context only. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/51c817eaf58a5b7f372ff0ffc8c8d4870663d286bd88e84b05e621c840482029.jpg)


57-60: If Saturn is posited in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house, debilitated, combust, danger of poison and weapons, destruction of place, change of place, intense fear, agony of parents, grief of wife and children, antigovernmental activities and misfortune, imprisonment etc., and distressful results therefrom are expected. Saturns, if conjoined with benefic and Yogakarka planets, posited in Angles, Trine houses, the 11th house or in Pisces or Sagittarius sign, gain from authorities (Government), highly enthusiasm, comfort of clothes, elephant, horses (conveyance) etc., will be attained. 

# Results of the Dasa of Mercury :

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/a96d81ad8c7e6564f51ff7ee44199fc04a935a06d0ce49fba65e55ef6cee9d2b.jpg)


61: Now I narrate the results of the Dasa of Moon's son Mercury who is also known as 'Kumar' planet (adolescence) 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/e30b3996b230cae0c2f54171916f909b972502101f1146bcd2fcd2e430fd8bc1.jpg)


62-65: Mercury being exalted, posited in own sign, Angles (Kendras), Trines, friendly sign ushers happiness, acquisition of wealth, prosperity; popularity, property, attainment of higher education and refund qualities gratification from the Rulers, keen interest in pious works, warmth of wife and children, pleasure of sound health, high degree of contentment, decent food (prepared in milk), and business gains. Mercury if aspected by or conjunct with benefic planets and lord of 10th house or having Bhava Bala, its Dasa will give full effects. 

Notes: In the Dasa of benefic Mercury, the income is earned through many sources. Mercury is the Karaka of intelligence and business/ trade as such, it gives high attainments in the educational front. The native carries many literary pursuits and there is big boost to the business. Mercury itself is a 'Satvika' planet and it takes the native towards righteous, virtuous and ethical side and protect him against false pride etc. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/8602b9a4471c08865dacf84cd60d7ddebd17d3b3e34d43df5fc2722bbbedf1b9.jpg)


66-70: Mercury if aspected by or conjunct with the malefic planets, the native faces the wrath of the Ruler (Government), gets mentally upset, confrontation from co-borns and relatives, foreign travels etc. Also becomes dependant, acquires urinary disease and under goes grave fear. If Mercury is located in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house, income, passion and wealth gets decimated, disease like jaundice and rheumatism are indicative. Fright of the Government (King), theft, fire etc., destruction of agriculture produce, cattles, property (land). The beginning of the Dasa brings about, wealth and agriculture produce, abundant comforts, warmth of sons, felicity, acquisition of property, gains in wealth. Middle part of the Dasa, 

brings recognition from the king (Government) and last portion of the Dasa, sets in miseries, obstacles etc.

72-77: If Ketu is posited in Angles (Kendras) the 11th house, Trines (Trikonas), in benefic signs duly aspected by the benefic Vargas (divisions), seeking of kings' affection, administrator of the country or village, possibility of the pleasure of conveyance and children, happiness from the travelling of the country and foreign land be indicative. In this Ketu's Dasa, the native will have the pleasure of his wife and children and gains of cattles. Ketu being in the 3rd, the 6th or the 11th house will give happiness in its Dasa and the native gains from the king, affection of freinds and pleasure of owning elephant, horses etc. (conveyance). Beginning of the Dasa brings kingship, in the middle of the Dasa, feeling of intense fear and towards the end of the Dasa, travelling to farlung countries and fear of ailments is felt. Ketu conjunct with or aspected by the malefic planets while posited in the 2nd, the 8th or the 12th house 

brings about severance of relationship with co-borns, relatives etc., and destruction of the property (land), anguish, company of inferiors, eruption of disease etc. 

Notes: Rahu and Ketu get maximum influence from the planet with whom they are conjunct with. It they are not in conjunction with any planet, the lords of the signs located with, exert their influence on them. Therefore, they emphatically deliver the effects of the planets, they have these kinds of associations. 

# Results of the Dasa of Venus.

78: Venus who resides in every human being with passion and strong emotions and preceptor of the devils, Brahmin by caste, now I perorate the results of the Dasa of that very Venus before you.

79-82: If Venus is in deep exaltation, own sign or in Angles (Kendras), the native will have coronations (kingship); gains of vehicles, clothes, ornaments, elephants, horses (conveyance) and other animals; eats food with sweet every day, gets recognition from sovereign, sounding of drum (percussions) loudly and gets wealthy and prosperous house (with the grace of goddess Laxami). Venus if occupies the Trines (Trikona), bestowal of kingdom (synonymity with the high government position etc.), wealth, house, festivity at home, welfare of childrens, commandership of the army and welcome visits of the dear relatives, accumulation of cattle be also 

predicted. 

Notes: Venus is the Karaka of sex, lust and passion, status, respects, ornaments, work energy, wealth assets, marriage, cattle, musical instruments, conveyance, (horse, in ancient parlance) delightful beauty, treasure, honour, ministership, putting king under spell, occultism, tantric. Auspicious and strong Dasa of Venus, the native will have all the amenities, traits etc., signified by the planet. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/3c5149969088e3d67d486f80a8d13eb91b0885526614a839c8b0ee1be72196a0.jpg)


83-84½: Venus, in case is posited in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house, in the sign of debilitation or in the sign of the 12th lord, the Dasa of Venus will produce enmity with the relatives, distress from the women folks, loss in business, cattle etc., agony to wife and children, annoyance of relatives etc. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/d3e40de062e6a1437986d095ab6b16648e89f49fe582f6e6282fc88b14f125b2.jpg)


85-87: Venus being the lord of the 9th or the 10th house and posited in the Ascendant or the 4th house, the Dasa of Venus will set in tremendous happiness and the native becomes administrator of state or village (town), his religious instinct will get stirred up and thus he will construct temples, tanks and will take pleasure in giving donation of food etc., eat sumptuous food with sweet, get enthusiastic towards his work and will have the comfort of status, wealth, assets, wife, children etc. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/b670cd2186727f0a708f9a4b20188a2a6f1ad65d3b21d029e3e4e947f72070bb.jpg)


88-89: Apropos results are in the Dasa of Venus and similar kind of results may also be expected in the Venus's Antradasa of the Mahadasa of other planets. Should Venus be the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house, there will be physical danger. To mitigate this effect, obeisance of Lord Shiva through Vedic Mantras or recitation of Mrityunjaya (प्रधान्यून्दिक रत्ति) may be performed. Donation of cow or buffalo also brings a sound health. 

Notes: Acquiring the lordshiphip of the 2nd and the 7th houses, Venus becomes Maraka (propensity of inflicting death). However, Venus acts as Maraka when posited in the malefic houses. With the placement in the inauspicious houses and under malefic aspects, Venus becomes more powerful towards his function of Markesha. 

The good and adverse results of the planets surface during the Mahadasa and Antardasa of such planets. However, the native also experiences the effect of the other planets who are exerting their influences (benefic or malefic) on the planet whose Dasa or Antardasa is operating. With every Ascendant, the sequence of the results of the Dasa of a particular planet gets changed. The Ascendant plays predominant role in fixing malefic or benefic characteristic of a planet and consequently sets in variation in the results during their Dasas. 

# Aey 140

# Chapter - 50

# RESULTS OF SPECIAL NAKSHATRAS' DASAS

# sRyAnonrtyiivBovnoyev Kefal T PloKef T PuRavTne: |

1: In the ancient texts, the results of the Dasas are disseminated based on the strength of the houses. Now I describe the results of Dasas related to the lords of the houses. 

Lagneneaahaye dhyaakalae Satakeiitiehaj uukamu I   
dnehaaydhyaay a u kleey o yar uukuyotu bnyamu | 12 |

2-4: During the Dasa of the lord of the Ascendant, the native enjoys sound health, high fame, etc.; in the Dasa of the lord of the second house, conflicts, fear of death and in the Dasa of the lord of the third house, unfavourable results be anticipated. In the Dasa of the lord of fourth house, luxury of house and land (property); in the Dasa of 

the lord of the fifth house, progress in education and pleasure of children and in the sixth house's lord Dasa, physical sufferings and danger from the enemies be described. 

Notes : In the Dasa of the Asendant's lord, the native is blessed with good health, free from any kind of illness because the Ascendant represents body of the native. No doubt this text has special importance, but we have also to inevitably analyse the position and the strength of the Ascendant. In case, the lord of the Ascendant is in the enemy's sign, the resistance of the body gets reduced and the native may have an attack of some disease and with the result, the body will suffer. If the lord of the Ascendant is in debilitation, the damage in the body is more pronounced. One may get hurt in a sudden accident, go into depression, feel deranged or lethargic etc. If the lord of the Ascendant is heading towards debilitation (Avrohi) during the illness, the native suddenly loses weight and his condition will get deteriorated day by day. If per chance, the Ascendant lord also receives affliction in transit, the condition may get worst. 

The following states (Avasthas) of the lord of the Ascendant which tend to take the native towards old age, rather quickly: 

i) If it is heading towards debilitation (Avrohi) 

ii) If it is in the debilitation. 

iii) If it is having connection with the 8th Lord. 

[Like, (a) conjuct with the 8th lord, (b) the 8th lord posited in the Ascendant, c) Ascendant and the 8th lord in the 6th or the 12th house]. 

Therefore, if the lord of the ascendant is found in any of these three states in the nativity, the Mahadasa of the Ascendant lord will persistently affect the health of the native and he remains in the grip of sickness. 

The Ascendant lord if is also connected with the lord of the 2nd, the 7th, the 6th or the 12th house, ever then one may face illness during its Dasa. In the state of debilitation, the lord of the Ascendant in its Dasa makes the native mentally deranged. 

If there is any retrograde malefic planet in the 2nd house from the Ascendant lord which also has a malefic planet behind it (in 12th house), the Antradasas of these two malefic planets in the Mahadasa of the Ascendant lord will set in some serious disease (relating to the body). 

If the Ascendant lord is posited in a malefic Sashtamsa, defeated 

in the planetary war, in the last Amsa of a fixed sign, in the young or the old age of the lord of 22nd Drekkana, Gulika, Mandi or 64th Navamsa, moving towards the sign of debilitation, it will also be hazardous to the health of the native. Apart from bodily sufferings, a weak Ascendant lord is responsible for unethical acts, defame, loss of pride, arrogance, cruelty, insult etc. 

In addition, the results of the Dasa of the lord of the Ascendant will vary in accordance to the different rising signs (Ascendants). 

The Ascendant lord, if strong and connected with the auspicious houses and benefic lord of a house, during its Dasa, native attains fame, comforts, smartness, exaltation, pride, politeness, beauty, sound health, praise, soft behaviour etc. 

In the Dasa of the lord of the 2nd house, fear of conflicts and death that the native may grapple with, but these results are far fetched one. the 2nd and the 7th houses are the "Maraka Sthanas". The 2nd house has greater propensity than the 7th house. The 2nd lord if get conjunct with and have any kind of connection with the malefic planets or there are malefic planets posited in the 2nd house, the Dasa of the lord of 2nd house is reckoned as Maraka Dasa. The 2nd lord if has even ordinary affliction, it brings about conflicts in day to day dealings. The reasons for such conflicts may vary in each time. 

In the Dasa of a strong and auspicious 2nd lord, the native accumulates wealth and creates assets. He also buys gold and ornaments and has a bank locker registered in his name. With whichever house or house lord, the lord of the 2nd house establishes its connections, the native will acquire wealth connected with the signification of that house and house lord. 

The Sage considers the third house as malefic and inauspicious house. Therefore, the Dasa of the 3rd lord renders malefic results. During this Dasa, the native plans about his business activities and makes efforts for its accomplishment. The native is very exertive and struggles his ways through for the attainments of his ventures during the Dasa of the 3rd lord. Should the lord of the 3rd house be powerful, the native gets success of his laborius attempts and sustained efforts, otherwise, his struggle will end in futility. 

In the event of 3rd house lord being strong, the native will also gain weight and if this Dasa falls in the young age of the native, he develops lot 

of strength and dignity. He inculcates the habits of hard working and making profit. He gets affectionate towards his co-borns. He will undertake lot of business and pleasure tourings. The division of ancestral property also generally takes place during this Dasa. The native will leave no stone unturned for the achievement of his ambitions. 

In the Dasa of the 4th house lord, if it is strong and well placed, the native achieves high position in the society, attains popularity, acquires conveyance, constructs house, gains in the agricultural field and cattle etc. If 4th lord happened to be weak, the adverse effects may be expected. 

The Dasa of the strong and well placed lord of the 5th house, the native will get maturity in his thinkings and will undertake the work in all seriousness and use his wisdom and foresight. The native will get success in big venture. He also develops his acquaintances with the ladies of high status. In case the native is a writer, he will write his great works during this period that because in this time, one has full concentration of his mind and consequently, he can put heart and soul in such ventures. Therefore, it is in this period that the native could be conferred with some recognised award for his works. The Dasa of a weak lord of the 5th house will give reverse results. 

The results of the Dasa of the lord of the 6th house as experienced by the humble author are like this; the native develops estranged relation with his relatives and known persons. The native experiences stresses and strains. He takes loans and able to return the same but if 6th lord is weak, the native will face extreme difficulties and there will be some delays in returning the loans. However, during this period, the native can earn through work (labour) force. In the event of 6th lord being weak, he may face confrontations with the labour and gets his work done after encountering one obstacle after another. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/df32bc932d77d54d67a958c35194614916961b551ac1dccb613567cb64d438c2.jpg)


5-8: During the Dasa of the lord of the 7th house, there will be danger to wife, fear of death; in the Dasa of the lord of the 8th house, loss of wealth, danger to life; in the 9th house lord's Dasa, fabulous gain of wealth and fame; in the Dasa of the 10th house lord, recognition from state or authorities; during the Dasa of the lord of the 11th house, gains, obstacles and fear of sickness and O, Brahim! in the Dasa of the 12th house lord, the native faces extensive distress. 

Notes: In the Dasa of the 7th lord, their is possibility of all kind of ailments to the wife if the 7th lord has connection with the malefic planets and is also weak. The 7th lord will only have the potential of inflicting death, when it is posited in the 'Maraka' houses duly conjunct or aspected by the malefic planets. During the Dasa of auspicious 7th Lord there is possibility of marriage, festivity at home, family happiness, business growth, etc. In the Dasa of an inauspicious 7th lord, the native gets the tendency of making earnings through unscrupulous and illegal means; indulges in debauchery despite being a married person and also gets into the habit of drinking. The native may suffer from the urinary related disease and stone in the kidney etc. be suspected. If the degree of malefancy is high, there will be danger to the life of the wife or grand father, and he will cheat his partner and will have conflicts at home etc. 

In the Dasa of the 8th lord, the native suffers from suspicion, will doubt others and tell lies, will have psychosis fear etc. If the 8th Lord is strong, one acquires wealth through a 'will', from insurance and have other kinds of pit fall gains. The native also gets success in arduous and adventurous task or ventures. A weak 8th lord's Dasa, gives rise to conflict due to some misunderstanding, company of unscrupulous lots and he himself will get involved into lacivious activities. 

In this period one also faces punishment from the (king) authorities, Government etc. loss of precious and other items, mental discontent and uneasiness, risking one's life, untold miseries etc. 

During the Dasa of an auspicious 9th Lord, pilgrimages to shrines and holy places, distant travellings within the country, advance study, chances of boosting one's fortune, blessings of esteemed learned, rise of benevolent, keen support from the guide for Ph.D., company of religious people etc., are the results of the Dasa. In an inauspious Dasa on the 9th 

lord, there will be delay and obstacles in the progress. The native in service will face impediments in his promotions and his controlling officer may spoil the confidential reports. The native gets disillusioned about ethics, principles, beliefs and values and he starts defining religious realities in these context. Should the 9th lord be in retrogression, these transformations will bound to take place. 

In the Dasa of benefic 10th lord one gets fame, elevation in status and living standard and there will be an overall progress. He gets favours from the influential people, and enhances his dominance. The business level will move up and no impediments in the business activities will be experienced. There will be festivity at home, the religious functions will get accomplished and the native will concentrate in the purity of the amenities. 

An inauspicious Dasa of the 10th lord brings punishment from the Government (authorities), business gets moderated, father will get sick, religious functions get disturbed and some kind of conflict etc. has to be faced. One's pride, fame, prestige, status get ridiculed. Others will overpower the native and he will not get his rights and inorder to achieve the success, he will resort to unscrupulous means. 

In the Dasa of the auspicious 11th lord, efforts get fructified easily, success in ventures, high expectations will also get accomplished. One achieves the desired things etc. That is why this house is known as "house of accomplishments". 

The inauspicious Dasa of the 11th lord, the capacity of earnings get retarded and the native runs after the speculative business such as shares, lottery, 'Satta' etc., for which he does not have to make much efforts. 

In the strong 12th lord's Dasa, foreign travels will be on card and the native will indulge in export business, tourism etc. This Dasa is good for trade dealings with the supply of goods. The debts get redeemed and the native will have the pleasure of lavish and luxuriant delightful nights. 

A weak 12th lord's Dasa will denote fear of imprisonment, unwanted expenditures for the native. The possibility of eye's infection, fear from the enemies, estranged relationship with the relatives may develop; chances of some part of the body getting amputated or damaged. Lack of sound sleep; the native may get addiction, loss of friendship, the programme of foreign travels gets into jeopardy and loss in the foreign 

transactions be caused. 

In the last Shloka, the Sage has emphasised the transit positions of the planets. Although the Dasa may be unfavourable, if the said planet is having a favourable transit in the signs of auspicious houses, it will not produce unfavourable results as long as it remains in that transit. Conversely, if the planet is having a favourable Dasa but the transit is not good, in that case, the favourable results gets forestalled till the time the planet is passing through such a phase of the transit. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/a9ef0c2e4c4d17fcaee028f352cee44395d62e2acb845ddff8b8c69726151aab.jpg)


9-13: The results of the Dasa of the 10th lord will be auspicious if conjunct with the 5th or the 9th lord. The Dasa of the other planets will also be favourable if posited with the 5th lord. Conjunction of the 9th lord with the other planets will cause exceedingly good results during the Dasa of such planets. The Dasa of the 9th lord if conjoined with the 4th lord and the Dasa of the 10th lord if posited in the 5th house are also the benefic Dasas. The Dasas of the Trine lords occupying Angles (kendras) position or the Angle lords located in the Trine houses, also render good results and these Dasas according to the Astrological Savants are said to be extremely auspicious. 

Notes: The apropos Shlokas unfold the most important maxims relating to the effects of Vimshottari Dasas which are elaborated in the following notes : 

i) The Dasa of the 10th lord duly conjunct with the 5th lord brings favourable results. This Dasa will boost the career 

or business of the native in which his personal efforts will contribute a lot. Owing to his high degree of intelligence and mental ability he attains status, dignity, fame, progress and imposes his convictions and ideas. The native adopts right path and does such good works which not only stand in good stead for the building of his future but also enriches his next birth. 

ii) The Dasa of the 10th lord is also exceedingly beneficial if 9th lord is posited with it. In this Dasa, the native reaps the fruit of his past 'Karmas' and good results of his fate get transcribed. 

iii) The Dasas of the planets having company of the 5th lord also cause good effects. 

iv) However, the conjunction of the 9th lord with any planet gives excellent results during its Dasas. 

v) The auspicious results of the 9th lord is also expected if it is posited with the 4th lord. 

vi) The position of the 10th lord in the 5th house ushers favourable results. 

vii) The exchange between the Angles and the Trine lords is par-excellent and this is reckoned as most powerful Yogkaraka. 

The rules (iii) & (iv) at times cause reverse effects. It is necessary to understand as to which planet is having conjunction with the 5th or the 9th lords because lots depend upon the natural characteristics of this planet and the house being represented by it. The results will get greatly influenced by these factors. 

$\text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} \text{普} 1$ 

14-17½ : The visionaries of 'Kala' have described the Dasas of the 6th, the 8th or the 12th lord as auspicious if they have the conjunction of the lord of Trines. The Dasa of the planets having the conjunction of the Trines lords posited in Angles or Angles lords posited in Trines is also favourable. If the Ascendant occupies the 9th house or the 9th lord occupies the Ascendant, in which case, the Dasas of both these lords bring happiness and comforts. The Dasa of the 10th lord posited in the Ascendant or Dasa of the Ascendant posited in the 10th house will certainly bring gains from the king, (Government, authorities etc.) 

Notes: As a matter of fact, the auspiciousness has been bestowed upon (i.e. inbuilt in) the lords of Trines (Trikanas) but the Angle's lords if placed in neutrality become Yogakaraka only when they get the company of the Trine lords. The 5th and the 9th are the trine houses. The Ascendant is also taken as trine. All these three Trines have different qualities and characteristics. 

A person who gets things through his family traditions, refinements customs, circle etc., remain with him throughout his life. These aspects are delineated from the Ascendant. The effects of these inheritance on the education, comforts, stability, longevity, wealth, wife, children and social contacts are to be studied from the combinations as formed by the Ascendant duly revealed in these Shlokas. 

The 10th lord in the Ascendant and the Ascendant in the 10th house will certainly bring benefits to the native from the king or his controlling authorities. This native will certainly have birth in a family having political interests and he will be brought up in these environments. Right from birth the native will harbour deep ambitions of acquiring the position in the State affairs and his mind assimilates the trick of the trade and other political niceties etc., will get deep seated and naturally, he will progress in that direction. As it is, the 10th house and the 10th lord are of neutral character and they are like a virgin land without seed but if it has seeds as signified by the Ascendant such as family traditions, customs, circles and other manifestations are sown, it will disindicate similar types of results. 

In the same manner, the connection of the 9th lord and the 10th house will manifest luck, fortune (Bhagya) etc. The 5th house and the 5th lord are such elements of the horoscope which give rise to the 9th house and the 9th lord because the past karmas make the 'Bhagya'. The connection of the 5th lord reveal that the native's gains are neither through family traditions nor through 'Bhagya' but through his own personal efforts. 

The lords of the Trines unless establish their connections with the Angles (Kendras), it will be like a unferlite seed which remains dormant. It gives results only through the medium of the connected planets. The lords of the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house get a connection with the trine lords (family traditions - the Ascendant, intelligent work-5th lord; luck - 9th Lord) obviously these houses will also get charged with the potency of rendering good results. For example, in the combination of the 5th and the 8th lords, the native gets success in Law or Medical Sciences and on top of it, if the 9th lord is also strongand other Yogakaraks also exist in the nativity, he will be a brilliant student in this field. 

The combination of the 5th and the 8th lords will indicate Mining Engineering or study of Ancient Languages and the 5th and the 12th lords' combinations impart study in the foreign country. 

In the same manner, the connection of the 4th, the 10th, the 9th and the 6th houses will make the native owner of a big Nursing Home. In the horoscopes of the persons who are involved in the export business of antique items, the combination of the 9th, the 8th, the 10th and the 12th lords is noticed. From these citations, it is evident that the lords of even evil houses i.e., the 6th, the 8th and the 12th are also capable of producing good results during their Dasas. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/a8829abc27c77d966e14b95c05e3945cc2f53edcaf838fa887d80ae16cffc308.jpg)


18-20: The Dasa of the auspicious planets posited in the 

3rd, the 6th or the 11th house or their lords or the planets connected with their lords, manifest unfavourable results. The Dasa of a planet combining with lords of the 2nd or the 7th houses (Maraka Sthana) and also posited therein or the Dasa of a planet placed in the 8th house is considered inauspicious and will give unfavourable results. 

In this way, with the inter-relationship and the combination of the houses and their planetary lords, the favourable and unfavourable results of the Dasas of the planets be ascertained. 

# 阿

# Chapter - 51

# Results of Kalachakra Dasas

Khyayyamny ！ 

T 

Rukalatilatataadii 2yagai nuaaamkakel 

哈宁阿克利尼亚阿吉-瓦斯阿普罗图达： 11211

JyRnMg y dfoi 1 

Praananaa 1 

n kit 1 

vivahaiuuii iinaihavahn 111 

Lahapaoaikm Huhuduuln 

EeVbMnKdVHJyN 11 

1-5: Maharishi Parasara said - O Vipra! Now I perorate the results of the Kalachakra Dasas. To start with, the results of the lords of the signs Sun etc.; will be described. The Dasa of the sign occupied by the Sung gives diseases relating to blood and biles. The Dasa of sign occupied by the Moon will manifest wealth, fame, increase in children, clothes, precious ornaments etc. The Dasa of sign with Mars in it, produces fever, bile related diseases, arthritis, boils etc. The Dasa of the Mercury occupied sign will cause birth of 

children, good income etc. The Dasa of the sign tenanted by Jupiter, ushers goodwill and wealth, begets children, enjoyment in utilising the objects. The Dasa of sign with Venus in position, brings progress in the field of education, marriage, agriculture produce in a full measure. The sign's Dasa harbouring Saturn, results in obstacles, miseries and lot of children. 

Notes: The lord of the Navamsa of the Nakshatras having the Moon in conjunction or in aspects with the Moon, the Kalachakra Dasa brings about particular results for the native. 

The Maharishi has narrated the results of the Dasas of the signs duly posited with a planet viz., Sun etc., but the Sage has not specified the results of such signs being Deha or Jeeva. It construes that no due consideration is to be given to Deha or Jeeva signs. The results described in the Shloka are rather too brief and cryptic in nature. As such the elaboration of these results is felt necessary. 

The Dasa of the sign harbouring the Sun, brings about lot of problems and obstacles, the wealth get depleted, persecution by the enemies, lot of misunderstanding about the native creeps in the minds of the people which spoils his relationship with them. He suffers in the hands of influential persons. Possible reversions, humiliation, loss of prestige and reputation, disease, like blisters in the mouth, ear trouble, T.B etc., may also take place. Chances of loss of cattle and death of co-born will also be there. 

In the Moon's tenanted sign's Dasa, public image gets exalted, and native will have nomination to a post in a social undertakings, good health, adorns costly garments, acquisition of precious ornaments etc. Besides, recognition from the government (authorities etc.), surge of intelligence, pilgrimages get manifested. Should this Dasa run in childhood, there is overall development of the child and the native gets protected against bad habits. 

The Dasa of Mars tenanted sign, will cause high fever, dryness in the throat, will feel thirsty, fear of electric shock, danger of fire accident, theft etc.; conflicts with brothers or friends, death of brother, loss of wealth, litigation concerning land and property and losing the cases, possible reversion, indulgence in war, involvement in a criminal case etc., may also 

happen. The diseases like blisters in the mouth, piles, leopresy and getting into bad company and things like these get manifested. During this Dasa business will be of a mediocre level and get further declined and in case he starts new business that too will be of low level. This Dasa also results in small pox, biles related diseases, arthritis, injuries, surgical operations, accidents, death from a fall, punishment from the king, government or controlling authorities. 

In the Dasa of the sign posited with Mercury, the native plans out his business and attains good progress in his venture, gets supports from his friends, plausible achievements in the experiments, happiness of married life and children, acquaintances with bigwigs in the government and eminent personalities, possibility of award sponsored by the government, accretion of wealth, fame and conveyance etc., are the auspicious results. In this Dasa, consultancy service will be a profitable business and will be particularly beneficial to the students and advocates. 

The Dasa of the sign occupied by Jupiter will manifest influx of wealth through different sources which the native will convert into various assets. Native's reputation and excellence gets enhanced. Rise in position, happiness of wife and children, enjoys sound health, indulgence in social, religious and charitable works which gets him prominence. Native undertakes foreign travels and eams sumptuous profits in this period. 

In the Dasa of Venus occupied sign, the native develops affectionate contacts with women, through which he get passionate happiness, women also get attracted towards native, acquires ornaments, wealth, vehicles, shows keen interests in fine-art, dance, music etc. Besides, there will be increase of fame and expansion of business activities. If the second sign of the disposeritor of Venus, has Jupiter in it, in that event, the native will establish a magnificent women hermitage (Ashrama). He will have strong feelings towards the welfare of the women. 

In the Saturn occupied sign's Dasa, the native gets excited over non agreement even on trivial issues. Lack of body alertness, physical derangement, loss of weight, death in family or natives own death, strong reaction of the medicines, loss of wealth and prestige and incidents concerning damage to house, loss of crops, cattle, business etc., may occur. 

The astrological treatise Jataka Parijataka also contains the results of the Dasa of the signs occupied by Rahu and Ketu which are as follows: 

The Dasa of sign duly occupied by Rahu creates distrustance in the mind, inculcates worries, wrath of enemies, trouble to freinds, punishment by the king and the possibility of the paralytic attack. 

In the Dasa of sign occupied by Ketu, pain of injury caused by fire, loss of blood from the body, poverty, loss of wealth, death of some friend, shifting of place etc., will be manifested. 

The results of the Dasas in context with the Navamsas of the signs : 

# Results of the Navamsa of Aries sign .

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/46ba3feee6c50c641b399a8bb6f159fc93a063b519da55aa9c43096049cd4463.jpg)


6-7½ : Kalachakra Dasa of Aries in Aries-Navamsa, sufferings from the blood disease; in Taurus - Navamsa, accretion of wealth and agriculture produce; in Gemini-Navamsa, growth in intelligence, education; in Cancer-Navamsa, the native becomes wealthy; in Leo-Navamsa, trouble from the enemies; in Virgo-Navamsa, death of wife; in Libra-Navamsa, native acquires ministerial position; in Scorpio-Navamsa, possibility of death; in Sagittarius-Navama, gains in income. These are the kind of results felt in the Dasa of nine Navamsas or quarters of Aries sign. 

Notes: In the Kalachakra Dasa of the Aries sign, the results of Aries to Sagittarius Namvasas are experienced. The possibility of change in the degree and intensity of effectiveness or ineffectiveness of these results largely depend upon many other factors. For example, in the Aries sign, if Mercury is present, during the Dasa of Aries and in the Aries Navamsa, there will be shortage of haemoglobin in the blood; and in the presence of Saturn, the shortage of "iron" is felt. If Venus is posited in Aries and Dasa of Taurus Navamsa, brings gains in the business and if it is Moon, 

in the same Dasa the native gets income through agriculture and milk business. In the Navamsa of Taurus, the native acquires gold or other kind of fixed asset. In the Navamsa of Gemini, the native obtains education of such nature through which he makes his living because this will be a professional oriented type of education. 

Cancer-Navamsa in the Aries Kalachakra Dasamakes the native wealthy, this is what revealed by the Sage. These results are more pronounced in the horoscope of the ordinary rich persons and it does not bring much change for an already wealthy man. The position of Saturn in Aries indicates that the native was once greatly unsuccessful in his business. In the Sun's (Leo) Navamsa, enemies create hindrances but these effects are minimal although some differences are seemingly noticed. However, professional rivalries and ego conflicts are observed. 

Virgo-Navamsa of Aries Dasa indicates disease to any female member of the family and she may not necessarily be the wife of the native. The possibility of death in the Scorpio-Navamsa will be in the event of presence or aspect of malefic planets in Aries and Scorpio signs. Otherwise effects will be limited to injury or body ache. 

In the Aries Dasa of Sagittarius Navamsa, native builds up his good will and is able to get the required credit. Through these loans, he earns profits in his business or venture. 

# Results of the Navamsas of Taurus :

mukr krrn rnrnnn nnnn nnne

Laiolilke Raujupuoyayab Knanyayaa 111

mijuyne 7uitibabahr kayd uysnnaa 

8-10: Kalachakra Dasa of Taurus: In Capricorn - Navamsa, inclination towards sinful acts; in Aquarius-Navamsa, change in business; in Pisces-Navamsa, success in all works; in Scorpio-Navamsa danger from fire; in Libra Navamsa, royal recognition; in Virgo-Navamsa, increase of enemies: in Cancer-Navamsa, physical pains, stress to wife; in Leo Navamsa, eye disease and in Gemini 

Navamsa, obstacles in the field of livelihood. These are the results of Navamsa signs of the Dasa of Taurus sign. 

Notes: In the Capricorn-Navamsa and in the Taurus Kalachakra Dasa, the native commits financial irregularities and amasses wealth in his profession through unscrupulous means. In case Jupiter is posited in the Taurus sign, the native may land in prison due to his unethical activities. In Aquarius-Navamsa Dasa, the native gets vital successes in his business, the level of income goes up, professional ambitions get accomplished. In the Dasa of Pisces-Navamsa, as a result of these successes in the business, the native accumulates sizeable wealth. Besides, the other jobs will also be successful. 

In the Scorpio-Navamsa of Taurus Dasa, although the danger from the direct fire is rarely felt, the contact of the material duly energised by fire or power may inflict injury to the body. However, carelessly handling of the electricity, may result in a devastating fire accident. During the Dasa of Libra-Navamsa, on account of some recognition from the king (Government etc.) the position of the native in the society gets glorified. These attainments are the results of special work done by him. Virgo-Navamsa brings about enmity due to some kind of misunderstandings. 

In the Dasa of Cancer Navamsa, the wife of the native suffers from physical ailments and most of his time is spent in her treatment and all the members of the family have also to bear the brunt. In this period, there is possibility of epidemic amidst animals (specially mammals). During the period of Leo-Navamsa, apart from eye disease, throat, liver, pancreas etc. are also get affected. This is what generally observed. In Gemini-Navamsa, the native is not able to satisfy his customers. Infact, he indulges in wrong arguments with the customers and does not accept his mistakes which will cause annoyance amongst the customers. 

# Results of the Navamsa of Gemini :

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/24f87795a6c744adc9e1b9e8cd85cdfce4f79dd0194d1152cfd75c031ff138ce.jpg)


11-12½: Kalachakra Dasa of Gemini: In Taurus-Navamsa, gain of wealth; Aries-Navamsa, fever disease; Pisces-Navamsa, affection with maternal uncle; Aquarius-Navamsa, increase of enemies; Capricon-Navamsa, loss through thefts; Sagittarius-Navamsa, accumulation of weapons; Aries-Navamsa, injury through weapons; Taurus-Navamsa, conflicts; GeminiNavamsa, happiness. These are the results of the Dasas of the Navamsas of Gemini sign Kalachakra Dasa. 

Notes : In the Dasas of the Navamsas of the Gemini sign, there are some additional results felt to what has been described in the preceding paragraph. 

In the Taurus-Navamsas in the Gemini Kalachakra Dasawhatever wealth is acquired that comes from foreign land and this becomes a perennial source of income which leads to the accumulation of wealth. In Aries-Navamsa, there is intense body pain accompanied by high fever which results in small pox. In case there are other afflictions to Gemini sign, the intensity of small-pox will be high and the native experiences severe pains and headache. 

During the period of Pisces-Navamsa, the native attains business relationship with his maternal uncle and this relation will be on the basis of faith and affection. In the period of Aquarius-Navamsa, on account of secret activities of the enemies, hindrance are caused in the progress. As a result of these impediments, blames are levelled against the native which leaves lasting effect on him. In the Capricorn-Navamsa, precious house hold goods, money, important documents etc., get destroyed by white ants. Besides, these things may also get damaged in some other ways. If Jupiter and Mars are posited in Gemini, adverse situations like punishment from the authorities, income tax scrutiny, litigation etc., will be created. 

In the period of Sagittarius-Navamsa, the expression of accumulation of arms and weapons will be with the intention of doing business in these items and not due to any kind of danger from the enemies. The persons who are in the trade of arms and ammunition, these dispositions in their horoscopes are very well pronounced. In the Aries Navamsa, injuries due to weapons are generally noticed. These injuries will be on the many parts of the body. There will be repetition of these types 

of incidents. 

In Taurus-Navamsa, family quarrels and conflicts will be quite evident. The divisions of the property between the brothers could be one of the reasons for such conflicts and in this process, the native suffers losses. During the Gemini-Navamsa, environment of co-operation will exist. Success in ventures so also the plan of developments etc., will take place. The native will create his own niche in the society. If Gemini is occupied by Mars, one gets involved in the civil suits and if Mars has the aspect of Jupiter, such suits would result in his favour. 

# Results of the Navamsas of Cancer :

13-15: Kalachakra Dasa of Cancer - In Cancer-Navamsa, grave disaster; in Leo-Navamsa, wrath from the king ; in Virgo-Navamsa, deep regards for co-born;in Libra-Navamsa,benefaction; in Scorpio-Navamsa, trouble to father; in Sagittarius-Navamsa, acquisition of wealth and education; in Capricorn-Navamsa,danger from water; in Aquarius-Navamsa, accretion of food grains; and in Pisces-Navamsa, happiness, growth in wealth etc. These are the results of the Navamsa signs of Cancer Kalachakra Dasa. 

Notes: In the period of Cancer-Navamsa of Cancer Dasa, if Mars is posited in Cancer, the disease of the body is more intense with erratic blood pressure, symptom of T.B. gets surfaced. If Cancer sign is in the Ascendant, the chances of brain tumour will also be there. In the period of Leo-Navamsa, the displeasure or the wrath of the sovereign or Government or authorities is quite lasting one. In Virgo-Navamsa special affection and cooperation from the younger brother is felt. The native gets extremely busy. In Libra-Navamsa, the native eams public acclaims, fights elections in the local organisations and he also gets successes. 

In the period of Scorpio-Navamsa, native's father suffers from disease like piles, blisters in the mouth. On this account, his father will get mentally disturbed which will vitiate the entire environment of the house. In the period of Sagittarius-Navamsa, the native puts in extra efforts. The Navamsa of Capricorn may bring in death, boils and similar kind of diseases, fear from water, danger from crocodile, alligator, water reptiles etc. In Aquarius-Navamsa, the native will have good harvest, and in the period of Pisces-Navamsa, a person gets a specific recognition. If Jupiter is posited in the sign of Cancer, apart from recognition, good fortune and favours from the elite class of people are also conferred onthe native. 

# Results of the Namasas of Leo !

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c25c2676-b4e9-4550-b0d8-2e2c161e6e54/4a49b4c875aa2f840ecae0f0aba315e649de44b478277f5a3830590b46f9d73c.jpg)


16-17: Kalachakra Dasa of Leo : In Scorpio-Navamsa, conflicts and distress; in Libra-Navamsa, good gains; in Virgo-Navamsa, sumptuous gains; in the Cancer-Navamsa, obstacles from the forestry animals like deer; in Leo-Navamsa, birth of a child; in Gemini-Navamsa, increase of enemies; in Tarunus-Navamsa, profit from animals; in Aries-Navamsa, danger from the animals and in Pisces-Navamsa, long journeys (domestic). These are the results of the Dasas of the Navamsa sign of Leo Kalachakra Dasa. 

Notes: In the period of Scorpio Navamsa of Leo Dasa, one develops irritation and at time gets aggressive behaviour. But there will be tremendous amount of agility and enthusiasm. In the Libra-Navamsa, the native gets totally engrossed in his business activities. Whatever help he seeks at the government level, he gets it easily. In the period of Virgo-Navamsa, accumulation of wealth, purchase of ornaments and also purchase of fixed assets which are likely to be inherited by his children in future. 

In the period of Cancer-Navamsa, danger from the forestry animals is stated. However; it is also observed that there would be danger from the water reptiles and animals and reptiles dwelling in the burrows. In the Leo-Navamsa, a birth of a child (if there is desire for one will definitely be there). If Saturn is posited in Leo sign, there is danger of sickness for a achild. But if Mars and Jupiter are in Leo sign, the child will be quite intelligent. In the period of Gemini-Navamsa, the native has to suffer minimum of three types of diseases. 

In the period of Taurus-Navamsa, there will be a possibility of getting an agency of an enterprise. In Aries-Navamsa, injuries from the pet animals is there. In the Navamsa of Pisces period, foreign travels will be on card. There will be opportunities of sea voyage and chances of export business through sea routes. 

# Results of the Navamsas of Virgo :

18-19½: Kalachakra Dasa of Virgo: In Aquarius-Navamsa, gain of wealth; in Capricorn-Navamsa, native begets finances; in Sagittarius-Navamsa, contacts with the brothers; in Aries-Navamsa, warmth of mother; the Taurus-Navamsa, child birth; in Gemini-Navamsa, increase of enemies; in Cancer-Navamsa, love of a woman; in Leo-Navamsa, epidemic and in Virgo-Navamsa, increase in progeny. These are the results of the Navamsas of Virgo Kalachakra Dasa. 

Notes : It has been noticed that during the period of Capricom-Navamsa of Virgo Dasa, the wealth is acquired through the active in.   
dulgence of the sons of the native. In the period of Gemini-Navamsa, one develops enmity during the course of business transactions.

20-22: Kalachakra Dasa of Libra: In Libra-Navamsa, gain of wealth; in Scorpio-Navamsa, progress of brothers; in Sagittarius-Navamsa, affection of father; in Capricorn-Navamsa, mother's confrontation; in Aquarius-Navamsa, acquisition of wealth and birth of children; in Pisces-Navamsa, confrontation with the enemies; in Scorpio-Navamsa, opposition from the wife; in Libra-Navamsa, danger from water; in Virgo-Navamsa, increase of wealth. These are the results of the Navamsas of the Libra Dasas. 

Notes: In the Navamsa of Capricorn and Scorpio in Libra Dasa, opposition from mother and wife respectively has been indicated. These types of confrontations will be on account of the normal family dealings.

23-24½: Kalachakra Dasa of Scorpio : In the Navamsa of Cancer, loss of wealth; in the Navamsa of Leo, opposition from the sovereign; in the Navamsa of Gemini, acquisition of land; in the Navamsa of Taurus, gain of wealth; in the Navamsa of Aries, danger from serpants etc; in the Navamsa of Pisces, danger from water; in the Navamsa of Aquarius, gain in the business; in the Navamsa of Capricorn, ill health and in the Navamsa of Sagittarius, acquisition of wealth is indicated. These are the results of the Navamsas of the Scorpio Dasa. 

Notes: During the Navamsa of Aquarius of Scorpio Dasa, the native contemplates the plans for the new ventures. If the horoscope has promise of putting up an industry, the foundation of such industry is laid during this period.
