61-62: Placement of Venus in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th from the lord of the Mahadasa (Mars) or conjunction with the malefic planets will bring excessive grief, bodily pains, loss of wealth, danger from the thieves or the king, conflicts at home, distress from wife and children, destruction of animals like cow, buffalo (female) etc.

63: If Venus is posited in the 12th or the 7th house bodily pain is observed. For the mitigation of the ill effects, if cow, buffalo (female) etc., are given in charity, it will provide good longevity and sound health.

64-66: If in the Mahadasa of Mars and the Antardasa of the Sun is operating and if the Sun is in exaltation, own sign, Moolatrikona, Angles, Trines or in the 11th house and having the conjunction of the lords of the 9th and the 10th houses; vehicle, high reputation, birth of a child are attained. In this Antardasa, wealth, food grains, welfare and prosperity, good health, undaunted courage, felicitation by the king, excessive happiness, exceedingly successful business, meeting with the king in the foreign land etc., will be the results. 

Notes: The results of the Antardasa of the Sun in the Mahadasa of Mars embodied in the preceding Shioka are more true in the case of Aries, Leo, Scorpio, Sagittarius and Cancer Ascendants. Establishment of linkage by the Sun with the lords of the 9th or the 10th house will produce multitudinous effects. The Antardasa of the Sun will provide diminishing results in the descending order for the Gemini, Virgo, Capricom and Pisces Ascendants because for these Ascendants, the Sun acquires the lordship of the 3rd, the 12th, the 8th and the 6th houses respectively.

70-73: During the Mahadasa of Mars and the Antardasa of the Moon, if the Moon is in the sign of exaltation, own sign or in Angles in conjunction with the lords of the 9th, the 4th or the 10th house or the Ascendant lord, it will give fragrance, rosary of the 

flowers or clothes; will undertake pious deeds, construction of pond, cow shed etc., will have festivity of marriage, happiness from wife and children, co-operation from the parents, blessings of Goddess Laxami (wealth), completion of ambitious tasks with the blessings of the king etc. If it is full Moon, the result will be total and in case of weak Moon, diminishing results will be experienced.

74-76: Debilitated, in inimical sign and placed in the 6th or the 8th house from the lord of the Mahadasa, the Moon in its Antardasa will produce death, distress to wife and son, loss of land, destruction of animals and agricultural produce, danger from the thieves and war (encounter). If the same Moon is the lord of the 2nd or the 12th house, it will cause early death, danger to body, mental distress etc. Recitation of Mantras (Japa) of Goddess Durga, Laxami, giving away white cow, buffalo in charity will ward off the evil effects.

1-4: Position of Rahu in Cancer, Scorpio or Sagittarius sign delivers, felicitation from the king, clothes, vehicles, ornaments, copious profits in the business; gains of animals and acquisition of 

clothes and vehicles during the visits to the West, in the Antardasa of Rahu. 

Placement of Rahu in the Upachaya houses (3,6,10,11) from the Ascendant, having conjunction or aspects of auspicious planets or in the friendly Navamsa or exaltation sign, its Antardasa and also Mahadasa will bestow gain of kingdom, high degree of enthusiasm, affection of the king, auspiciousness, comforts from wife, feeling of exaltation due to increment in children, accretion of assets etc.

5-6: If Rahu is posited in the 8th or the 12th house from the Ascendant, in its own Mahadasa and Antardasa, there will undoubtedly, be grief from theft, injury etc., conflicts with the administratives of the king; destruction of co-borns; trouble to wife and children.

aayeyay aumayadkvebn mawiyaninit tada dij! | 10 

7: Rahu be the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house or located in these houses, will cause perpetual disease and extensive distress. By undertaking worships in a prescribed manner, OBrahmin! sound health and assets will be attained. 

Notes: Sage Parasara stated that the position of Rahu in the 4th, the 8th, the 6th and the 9th signs is auspicious. If these signs represent Upachaya houses (3,6,10,11) and Rahu is also posited therein, the status of Rahu as auspicious planet gets enhanced because by this, Rahu is endowed with two benefic factors i.e. suitable sign and a good house. 

It is also a firm conviction of the learned astrologers, that since Rahu has no base of its own, it acquires the characteristic of a planet in 

whose sign it is posited but at the same time, it also gives effect of the conjunct planets. 

Whatever might be the position of Rahu, it does administer the effect of mental tension, irritation, callousness, lethargy, strife, obstacles in work, enmity, disappointments, depression etc. in its Antardasa. 

However, depending upon its placement in the birth chart, the degree of intensity will vary. Let us take an example to bring home this point. 

# Example: 33

Data: Date of birth 8/9-10-1970; time of birth 5-02 hrs. (IST); Latitude $28^{\circ}$ -43' (N); Longitude $77^{\circ}$ -47' (E). 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/301f02e93f600c96fdba9138354f57f9ac03067463bc59fccf7d41bd2ae77f3c.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/1d11167e80319283e74010c6f73f97a50b70c8b24e8612bc772640b945593274.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/36c48659ac1af3d91238ec713d38a84554afd49a164cd90e51cdc73b63a05824.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/77d1a9fb5a92e817d05f34edbf7788b0eec2467de16855a40d93092b09b5ba09.jpg)


In the birth chart, Rahu is placed in Upachaya House (i.e. 6th), duly aspected by Mars and Jupiter and is also in its own Nakshatra Satbisha. The native completed medical education (M.B.B.S.). Although in the Antardasa and the Mahadasa of Rahu, which operated between 28-5-1991 and 2-2-1994, the native had good success in the education, 

he encountered series of difficulties in the period. He also faced disappointments, depression, hindrances etc. So much so, he reached to a stage where he was almost failing in the examination. Position of Rahu in the Upachaya house, both in the birth and Navamsa charts saved the situation and the native could ultimately achieve success. 

In Chaturamsa, Rahu is at a benefic position i.e. in the 5th house duly aspected by the Moon. Saturn is in the 9th house. The disappointment in the education was on account of Rahu's aspects on Saturn and the Ascendant. 

Here is another very interesting example of Rahu's Antardasa in the Mahadasa of Rahu.

# Results of the Antardasa of Jupiter in the Mahadasa of Rahu :

8-12½: If Jupiter is located in Angles, Trine, from the Ascendant, in exaltation or own sign; in own or exalted Navamsa, the Antardasa of Jupiter of the Mahadasa of Rahu will bring about the results like - acquisition of land; patience; decimation of enemy; abundant happiness, warmth towards king, progress like waxing Moon approaching Shukla Paksha; (full Moon), Vehicles; Wealth; accretion in the assets of animals at home. Undertaking journies in the West or South-East; meeting the king; accomplishment of ambitious plans; return to home country, helping Brahmins while on pilgrimage, acquiring a village; devotion to God and Brahmin, mental satisfaction over the festivity organised, on the birth of a child, meals with sweets, etc.

13-14½: If Jupiter is debilitated, combust or posited in Trik houses (6/8/12) and in inimical sign having conjunction or aspect with malefic planets, its Antardasa will cause loss of wealth, interruption in work, disrepute, trouble to wife and children, heart, entrusted with authority by the state etc.

15-17: Placement of strong Jupiter in Angle, Trine, in the 2nd or the 3rd house from the lord of the Mahadasa, its Antardasa will bestow additions of house, land etc; gain of wealth, clothes, and animals; inclination towards charity, religion, sipritual pursuits etc. 

Trouble through the wrath of the king (Government); loss of elder brother, distress to parents etc. are the type of malefic results that will be felt in the last two months of the Antardasa.

18-20: If Jupiter is posited in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house from the Mahadasa lord (Rahu) or in conjunction with the malefic planets, in its Antardasa, there will be loss of wealth and physical distress. In case Jupiter is the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house, an early death will cause. 

For the alleviation of the ill effects of the planets, Lord Shiva be worshipped and Golden image be given in charity which will appease the planets and sound health will be granted. 

Notes: Antardasa of Rahu in the Mahadasa of Rahu is followed by the Antardasa of Jupiter and if Jupiter is strong and connected with the benefic planets and also has the lordship of auspicious houses, it will produce excellent results. A highly ambitious plan for which the native will put so much struggle, will bear fruits in the Rahu Mahadasa and ultimately will get accomplished in the Antardasa of auspicious Jupiter. 

A very good example of benefic Jupiter is cited herewith, which will depict inheritance of huge property by the native from his mother's side in the Rahu's Mahadasa and in Jupiter's Antardasa. 

# Example - 35:

Data: Date of birth 31/1-10-1966; Time of birth, 4-21 hrs IST Latitude $28^{\circ}$ -43' (N); Longitude $77^{\circ}$ -47' (E) 

Balance Dasa : Moon 7 years - 3 months - 5 days

Jupiter Antardasa in Rahu's Mahadasa operated from 17-10-1983 to 11-3-1986. 

Jupiter having acquired the lordship of the 4th and the 7th houses is located in the 11th house, in its sign of exaltation and is placed at Angle to Rahu, the lord of the Mahadasa. Although, Jupiter is the lord of the 7th house, its exaltation position is protecting the health of the native and as such, he did not suffer any kind of ailment in this period. 

# Results of the Antardasa of Saturn in the Mahadasa of Rahu :

रागिकोरन्तरागिम नंधे ूलगा कोरागे | सोयेये मूल्दिकोरा अुँकिरवस्थे िलामर्वांहोि | 129 | 1

21-24: Placement of Saturn in Angle, Trine; sign of exaltation, Moolatrikona; in the 3rd or the 11th house will bring results such as, pleasure of serving the king, marriage festivity or other auspicious functions, development of garden and pond (water tank), accomplishment of the desired objectives of the Sudra King and accumulation of cows, visit to West and destruction of wealth denoted by the king, lethargy, depletion of income, visit back to home country, etc., in the Antardasa of Saturn of the Mahadasa of Rahu.

25-26: Should Saturn be in the sign of debilitation, in the enemy's sign, placed in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house or the conjunction with malefic planets, its Antardasa will cause hostility from menials, danger from the king, physical distress of wife and children, mental agony of the co-borns, conflict with the co-heir, complications and disputes in the business but there will be sudden gain of ornaments.

27-29: If the position of Saturn from the Mahadasa lord (Rahu) is at the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house and in conjunction with the malefic planets, the Antardasa of Saturn will produce heart ailments, disrepute, danger from the enemy, visits to other countries, disease of boils, bad food, fear of grief of the people from ones own caste. If Saturn is the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house, there will be untimely (early) death. During this time, charity of black cow or buffalo will bring sound health and alleviate the ill effects. 

Notes: The indicative results of the Saturn in the Mahadasa of Rahu and also in its Antardasa, generally get enhanced because the learned Astrologers consider the nature of Rahu identical to Saturn. If Saturn is placed in its own, Mooitrikona or exaltation sign but not having the lordship of an inauspicious house, the native receives maximum effects embodied in these Shlokas. If the Ascendant is strong, the Antardasa will give perpetual good results. 

Satum being the lord of the Ascendant, if posited in the 2nd or other Maraka house, it does not bring any kind of affliction to the native's body. However, if there is any other malefic influence, it many creat some health problems. 

Saturn's position in the 2nd house bestow assets to be inherited 

by the descendants of the native. There results are more pronounced in the Ascendant of Capricom. No doubt, native also accumulates assets in Sagittarius Ascendant, but this wealth is shared amongst the brothers, since Saturn takes over the lordship of the 3rd house in such a nativity. 

If Saturn is in the sign of exaltation, in the Ascendant of Scorpio, such native purchases fixed assets in other places. In case of Taurus Ascendant, an exalted Saturn (in the 6th house) will harm the business (10th house). Auspicious Saturn, by and large, renders benefic results in Libra Ascendant. 

We now analyse a horoscope of a person who achieved extra ordinary wealth, fixed assets and self marriage in the Antardasa of Saturn in the Mahadasa of Rahu. 

# Example : 36

Data: Date of birth: 29-5-1965; Time of birth, 23-24 hrs. (IST) Latitude $28^{\circ} - 30'$ (N); Longitude $77^{\circ} - 49'$ (E) 

Balance Dasa : The Sun 4 years, 9 months, 5 days 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/2efa1c21e69126b36e1f16cdfbb2d3a96fc4ed664f4d1b02ce410f317ffeadee.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/955657c50947286ea359c25277fa55090cb3ea9cf7ae1a1007b163e34a91de72.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/7da72db205692813178fbfd49ce576afe88feb8f7267f4a4f618a86c24cd8eab.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/48f789bcce491cfeeb199314ec49b5193250de89ef12ae567751e51ae806871b.jpg)


In the birth chart, Saturn is placed in its Mooaltrikona house and is also at Angle to Rahu. The native inherited huge property from father's side which was immediately utilised in the purchase of agricultural land. He also got married in this period, though one alliance was got annulled in May 1994. For this, the debilitated position of Saturn and placement of Jupiter in the 12th house in the Navamsa chart are responsible. The sub period of the Saturn of the main period of Rahu was in operation between 11-4-1992 and 15-2-1992. 

# Example : 37

Data: Date of birth 30-12-1959; Time of birth, 14-45 hrs. (IST) Latitude $29^{\circ}0$ (N); Longitude $77^{\circ} - 1'$ (E). 

Balance Dasa at birth : Venus 4 years, 7 months, 14 days. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/21e2a8008eec2b6924c6adeb72050a03edf053f20891726221ac1f1562a2449b.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/38ced0c765afc6473355da6fa39926bc06e1ad596aa3a247b6930cb116529c11.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/d843b54681576915b7f56bfac9f19b0f190f2258c6110a3c6cc50c5b147897ea.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/e73f569604aba5c40f815c2a0ccb85f7f4187df6dc9a554da90bfbb3177a9bd0.jpg)


In the birth chart, Satum is posited in the 8th house with two malefic planets (the Sun, the Moon) and also having the lordship of the 10th house. As such, the native suffered heavy losses in his business and he had to change his profession. Native's son also died by drownings under 

mysterious conditions in the sub-period of Saturn of the main period of Rahu (from 19-9-1992 to 27-7-1995). The Kastha Phala of Saturn is 33.40 and Ishta Phala 1.84. 

Although Saturn has the lordship of two auspicious houses (Yogakaraka), it is placed in a Trik house and its Ista Phala is also quite less. The 10th house represents 'work place' and the 9th house is also related to son (5th from 5th, and also having aspect of Rahu). Therefore, signification of both these houses have been affected in the Antardasa of Saturn.

56-59: Placement of Venus at Trik houses (6,8,12) from the lord of the Mahadasa (Rahu) duly conjunct with the malefic planets, its Antardasa will cause great fear of Brahmins, king, serpents, thieves, urinary diseases; diabetes, blood infection etc., insipid food, mental agony; loss of wealth due to imprisonment, persecution by the king (Government). If Venus is the lords of the 2nd or the 7th house, it will bring distress to wife and children; danger of self, sickness or premature death. 

Worship of Goddess Durga or Laxami will bestow happiness and prosperity.

In the birth chart, Venus is the lord of the 2nd and the 7th and is posited in its own sign with the Moon (exalted) and Saturn (friend of Venus). Shadabala of Venus is 6.90 Rupa which is more then the required strength of 5.50 Rupa. Jupiter lords of the 9th house throwing auspicious aspects. Rahu's aspects is also focussed at the 2nd house of Venus. This forms the connection of the auspicious planets i.e. Venus, the Moon and Jupiter and two friendly planets of Venus namely; Saturn and Rahu. The native got married in the Antardasa of Venus and Mahadasa of Rahu.

68-70: During the Antardasa of the Moon, in the Mahadasa of Rahu, if the Moon is in its own or exalted sign in Angle, Trine or in the 11th house or in the friendly sign, there will be gains through the king (Government), lucrative profits, sound health, ornaments; happiness from friends, wife and children; benefit from horses, vehicles; accretion of houses and land; king's recognition etc. The effects will be full during the bright Moon.

73-75: If the weak Moon is placed in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house, it will cause fear of evil spirits, tiger, other ferocious animals; loss of house and agricultural fields. Fear of theft during journey, deep injury and other serious diseases will also get erupted. 

If the Moon be the lord of the 2nd on the 7th house, premature death may cause. Donation of white cow and buffalo for Brahmins will mitigate the ill effects and bestow sound health and happiness with the blessings of the Moon. 

Notes: Results of the Moon's Antardasa in the Mahadasa of the Rahu have also been enunciated by savant Manteshwar, in Shloka-37 chapter-21 of Phaldeepika.

Meaning thereby that in the Mahadasa of Rahu and the Antardasa of the Moon, there will be loss of wife; quarrel with the people, mental distress; misfortune befall on friends; danger from water; loss of crops, wealth, animals and children. 

The underlying idea of citing this stanza from the other classical works on Astrology is, that one should analyse the effects of this Antardasa with great caution, because this sub-period does not pass through smoothly and without giving any trouble.

Mars in the Mahadasa of Rahu with Mars in the 9th house is given below: 

Data: Date of birth, 2-11-1954; Time of birth, 18-30 hrs. (IST) Latitude $28^{\circ} - 50'$ (N); Longitude $78^{\circ} - 45'$ (E). 

The native received a very big export order in this period which operated from 21.11.1992 to 9.12.1993, and was followed by many more orders but in the Antardasa of Saturn in the Mahadasa of Rahu, the condition of the business was rather bad. 

Mars the lord of the 7th (Business) and the 12th house (export) and is posited in the 9th house (fortune) is in exaltation. In Navamsa chart, Mars having been located in the 4th house, is casting aspect on the 9th house. The Dashamsa will further confirm the position.

In Dashama, Mars is again posited in its sign of exaltation in the 12th house. On account of connection of the 12th house of the birth and Dashamsa charts and also the business house, the export business could get greater degree of acceleration thereby yielding sizable amount of profits in the sub-period of Mars in the Main Dasa of Rahu.

# Chapter - 58

# RESULTS OF THE ANTARDASAS IN THE MAHADASA OF JUPITER

1-3½: If Jupiter is in Angle or Trine, in exaltation or own sign, the Antardasa of Jupiter also in the Mahadasa of Jupiter, will produce results like, attainment of kingship over many kings, deep affection of the king, gain of wealth, cows, buffaloes, clothes, vehicles, ornaments, a well fortified mansion, construction of a new house and all sorts of copious luxuries; rise in the fortune; time for the fructification of efforts, felicitation from Brahmins and the king; meeting with the king; specific gains from the master (employer); 

benefits to wife and children. 

Notes: Apropos Shlokas precisely indicate that during this period, the native is afforded with plenty of opportunities for meeting with the highly placed persons in the society, both in the field of religion and politics. In the natural horoscope, Jupiter being the lord of the 9th house, attributes significance of fortune, fructification of efforts, brahmins (pious and religious persons) children to the native. If Jupiter is strong, the results related to these distinguishing features would be pronounced. Should Jupiter attains the lordship of the 4th house, the native would acquire cow and buffalo herds, vehicle, would construct new mansion and gain reputation in society. 

If Jupiter attains the lordship of the 9th house in the nativity, it would bestow great knowledge to the native and would come in contact with learned, pious and religious preceptors. Being the lord of the 10th house, Jupiter would confer highly acclaimed regards from the king, elevation of position and would acquire political reckonings. There would be lot of festivities at home. 

Should Jupiter be the lord of the 2nd or the 11th house, it will render special results of acquiring money and material comforts. In the nativity, if Jupiter takes over the lordship of the 7th and the 10th houses, number of marriage functions would take place. In the event of lordship over the Ascendant and the 4th house by the Jupiter, it would make the native well composed, full of vigour and vitality and would also below solace and comforts. Some of the exponents of Astrology are of the opinion that Jupiter in its own Antardasa and Mahadasa, does not produce many auspicious results. It is an old saying that like a honest king who does not amass wealth and assets during his kingship, Jupiter also remains neutral in respect of wealth and assets during its Antardasa of its Mahadasa. There is some element of truth in it but during this period, native's latent and pious qualities certainly get exposed which helps him getting high status and reputation.

4-5½: If Jupiter is placed in the sign of debilitation and also in debilitated Navamsa or in the Trik houses (6/8/12), it will render results like company of the people of the lower strata, highly aggrieved, dispute with co-parceners, imprudent conflicts, untimely own or employers death, grief of wife and children, loss of wealth and prosperity.

8-11½: If Saturn is posited in its own, exalted or friendly sign or at Angle, Trine or in the 11th house from the Ascendant and endowed with strength, the Antardasa of Saturn in the Mahadasa of Jupiter would bring gain of kingdom, excessive happiness, clothes, ornaments, wealth, prosperity; acquisition of woman (wife), 

varied comforts, vehicles, animals, land, property; warmth of children and friends; comforts of palanquin, (luxurious vehicle); acquisition of blue clothes and blue coloured horse; visit to western countries; meetings with the kings and fleet of vehicles. 

Notes: In the Antardasa of Saturn, the maximum benefic results are seen in the Gemini nativity as the Mooltrikona sign of Saturn will fall in the 9th house and as such Saturn would acquire the potency of delivering benefic results of the 9th house in a great measure. In this nativity, Jupiter would own the 7th and the 10th houses (but their linkage should be strong) and therefore, both Jupiter and Saturn would act as Yogkaraka planets for such natives. 

In the other Ascendants, one of these planets would come up as a malefic planet and as such this sub-period of Saturn could depose inauspicious results only. Reference to the other classical works would clarify this aspect, where elaborate interpretations of these combinations have been enlisted. 

Jataka Parijata : 

i 

阿菲亚普斯卡托贝

It means that when the Antardasa of Saturn operates in the Jupiter's Mahadasa, there would be disturbed mind, enhancement of contemptuous feelings, extravagant expenditure by the son, loss or reverses in all ventures etc. 

Phaladeepika : 

Jz 1 

阿克蒙多拉德 莫蒙多尔德

吉士 哈尔特 那尼

It says that in the Mahadasa of Jupiter and the Antardasa of Saturn, company of prostitutes, increase in the liquor consumption and materialistic comforts are attained but there will be lot of distress in the family and cattle herds. Heavy expenditure, native remains under the spell of fear psychosis, eye disease, distress of son etc. will be the other effects. 

Similar kinds of effects could be quoted from the other ancient works on Astrology. An example to elucidate some of the results pertaining to this sub-period of Saturn is cited below : 

# Example-42

Data: Date of birth 24-10-1954; Time of birth 22-06 hrs. (IST) Latitude $29^{\circ} - 0'$ (N); Longitude $77^{\circ} - 42'$ (E) 

Balance Dasa Moon 6 years, 2 months, 20 days. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/d23887885cc8d1343dc7d5f3fdb44648b5ff5c65fc5daef20324ec07f377a752.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/1045264b0b86ff06793176829213c02a90806718e036e63a70bbebc352fe4ec7.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/ee6a28a4d1bc621c0879e6a48da747713e6917fad2cd81eb2ec951adebbb894f.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/8d7f7bbb2e447dbcb4d75179a05770301624c4ee950a6545f8f0dda7e29d4f58.jpg)


In the birth chart, Gemini is the Ascendant. Both Jupiter and Saturn are in the sign of exaltation. Although due to combustion of Saturn, it has lost some potency but it had made up through Shada Bala of 8.33 Rupa against the required strength of 5.00 Rupa. Both Saturn and Jupiter are in the friendly sign and are Angle to each other with Saturn aspects on Jupiter. Therefore, during the Antardasa of Saturn in the Mahadasa of Jupiter which operated between 5-3-1988 and 16-9-90, the native made tremendous progress in his business and entered into politics. Though he did not make much inroad in this field but the living standard made a quantum jump in this sub-period. 

In the Gemini nativity, the native experiences the benefic effects towards the latter part of the Antardasa, because in the earlier part it gives the results of the 8th house. (Saturn being the lord of both the 8th 

and the 9th houses).

# Results of the Antardasa of Mercury in the Mahadasa of Jupiter.

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/e1498b7100e24005f8027687c7e9c6969ab82d2dd322035e890241fcc064229e.jpg)


20-21½: Placement of Mercury in the Angle, Trine, own or exaltation sign or conjoined with the lord of the 10th house, will produce results such as gain of wealth; happiness of sound health, profit through king (state), excessive comforts, accomplishment of the ambitious plans with the blessing of the king; accumulation of vehicles, clothes, animals like cows etc., in the Antardasa of Mercury and in the Mahadasa of Jupiter. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/c653f2a7-c09c-4f3f-b6ce-f7184bb72a59/d2bde70f22b3b750f0a55923a97c4641f6889a525ee04b3e2d9a42afdc10d14a.jpg)


22-22½: If Mercury is under the aspect of Mars, the Antardasa of Mercury will produce malefic results like, increase of enemies, loss of happiness and business; disease like fever and dysentery.

23-24: If Mercury is placed at Angle, Trine from the lord of Mahadasa or in the sign of exaltation, there will be gain of wealth in one's own country, warmth of mother and father; possession of elephants, horses etc. (vehicles) with the blessings of the friendly king. 

Notes: There are different opinions expressed in the Phaladeepika in this context. 

i) The first one is that the Antardasa of the Mercury in Jupiter Mahadasa will produce inauspicious results, such as, flirtation with the women, earnings through gamblings and sale of liquors and native will remain sick with gastric, biles, phlegmatic diseases : 

ii) The other opinion is that in the Mahadasa of Jupiter will render only auspicious results. During the Antardasa, the native worships deities and Brahmins. He is also blessed with children and wealth. 

The Antardasa of Mercury in the Mahadasa of Jupiter is considered auspicious in Jataka Parjata. The version of this ancient treatise is that in this Antardasa, the native will profit from the business side; blessings of the king and the time passes through rather quite comfortably. Native undertakes pious deeds and observes austerity. 

The native with Aries Ascendants, contract diseases like gastric, biles and phlegmatic which is a natural because, in this Ascendant, Mercury takes the lordship of the 6th and the 3rd houses. In this Ascendant, Mercury will produce malefic results regardless of its placement. Apart from this, for Scorpio Ascendant, Mercury will give inauspicious results. Being the lord of the 8th house, the native will naturally take 

to drinking. In fact, there is no difference of opinion on these two Ascendants.

29-29½: If the same Mercury is aspected by or conjunct with the benefic planet, there will be affectionate warmth from wife, influx of wealth. In the beginning of the Antardasa, comforts of vehicle, clothes, gains and towards the end of the Antardasa, loss of wealth and physical distress etc. are felt. 

Notes: Mercury being the lord of the Ascendant, if posited in the Trik houses (6/8/12) or is under the aspect or conjunction with the malefic planets, the native will be under terrible physical fatigue and weariness. It is generally noticed that in Virgo Ascendant, if Mercury is placed in the similar fashion, such bodily distress is not only confined to the native but the father of the native will also get affected. Similarly, in the Gemini Ascendant, mother and native will experience such pains. Relating to this revelation, a horoscope is placed below :

In this birth chart, Mercury being the lord of the Ascendant (body of the native) is posited in the 6th house (house of disease) and the lord of the 6th house Saturn is located in the Ascendant. Again, Mercury is conjoined with the weak Moon and malefic Ketu duly aspected by malefic 

Mars. However, Mercury is also having the auspicious aspects of Jupiter and is placed at Angle to the lord of the Mahadasa (Jupiter). 

In the last part of Antardasa of Mercury and the Mahadasa of Jupiter which was in operation between 26-8-1992 and 2-12-1994, native met with a serious car accident and his body suffered multiple injuries. Father of the native was also in the same vehicle who got his both the legs fractured and also received head injury.

39-42: In the Mahadasa of Jupiter and the Antardasa of Venus, if Venus is placed in Angle, Trine, in the 11th house, or in own sign and conjoined with the benefic planets, the results will be, gain of Palanquin (limousine) elephants, horses, clothes; excessive gains with the grace of the king; copious luxuries; profit from eastward journey; auspiciousness at home; great pleasures to mother and father; worship of deity and preceptor; charity of food grains, development of pond and cattle shed and various other pious deeds. 

Notes: During the sub period of Venus in the main period of Jupiter, one should not be over ambitious because in most of the nativities, Jupiter or Venus will be the lord of the inauspious houses and therefore, results of this sub-period should be analysed rather carefully. An example of the Venus Antardasa in Jupiter Mahadasa is analysed over here.

69-71: If Mars is posited at the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house or in debilitation, aspected conjoined with the malefic planets, there will be loss of wealth, crops, house, fear and grief of various diseases; possibility of eye trouble. Notes : Difficulties and troubles do surface when the lords of Antardasa and Mahadasa are the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house to each other. In a horoscope analysed in the succeeding part of this note, Mars and Jupiter are at 6th and 8th places to each other and consequently the native suffered loss of prestige, mental distress and change of place during the sub-period of Mars in the main period of Jupiter. Infact, in this period the neighbours suspected illicit relation between the wife of the native and a person residing opposite to his house.

The sequence of incident was as follows. A youth staying opposite to the native's house observed that the natives' wife remained alone in the day time after sending her children to the school. He entered the house of the native one day and attempted to molest her but she resisted and thus the youth took to his heels. However, some neighbours noticed the youth leaving the house. When this woman narrated the whole episode, the neighbours took the side of the youth. After this incident, the native faced lots of allegations and suffered tremendous amount of humiliation and he was forced to sell his house and settle down in some other town. This all happened in the Antardasa of Mars.

1-3: If Saturn is placed in Moolatrikona, own, Libra or deep exaltation sign or in Angle, Trine duly-conjoined with Yogakaraka, during the Antardasa and the Mahadasa of Saturn, there will be gain 

of Kingdom (securing elevated position), utmost happiness, delight to wife and children. Comforts of three vehicles; accumulation of elephants, horses, clothes etc., appointment as Army Commander with the grace of the King (Government), gain of animals, village, land etc. will be the other results.

4-5½: Placement of Saturn at the 8th or the 12th house duly debilitated or conjoined with the malefic planets will cause danger from the king (State), injuries from poisoned weapons; profuse bleedings; disease of blisters, dysentery etc., in the beginning of the Antardasa. The middle portion of the Antardasa will produce results like danger from thieves; deserting the country; mental agony etc; and the concluding portion of the Antardasa brings happiness, blessedness etc. 

dhi taiyagunanayo uuyuayuuyuoyuivayotit | 16 |   
tahoyepriiuyarayuuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuyuy 

6-7 : Saturn being the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house, will cause premature death. For the alleviation of these effects, Mrityunjaya Japa be performed which will bestow calmness with the grace of Lord Shiva. 

Notes : The Antardasa of Saturn its Mahadasa is generally described as inauspicious in the various ancient classical works of Astrology. Savant Vaidyanatha writes in his Jataka Parijata "When Saturn's Antardasa operates in the Mahadasa of Saturn, itushers deep anguish and many diseases and would cause humiliation, jealousy, incredibility and excessive grief. During this period, the native will oppose one and all but bears with the antagonism of the king, when made to act as messenger; gets aged woman, suffers from the loss of animals; 

wife and children, feels distressed due to fever and may contract diseases, related to gastric, bile, phlegmatic, suffering piercing abdomen painetc." 

Learned Astrologer Manteshwarain Phaladeepika, adopted the middle course. He says "During this period, there will be improvement in the crops so also in servants and animals and at the same time it will cause trouble due to gastric diseases, lethargy, increase in malefic deeds. Besides, there will be gain of wealth through a Sudhra and company of woman older then the native". 

However, the version of Sage Parasara is more relevant because this visionary had deposed the results on the basis of different placements of Saturn in the nativity. Besides, the lords of the houses are also considered which are quite vital in delineating the total impact of a particular planet. 

In this context, a horoscope is illustrated as under:

In the birth chart, Saturn is placed in the 9th house and in its own sign. Saturn is also lord of the 10th house as such Saturn becomes Yogakaraka planet for this Ascendant. Saturn is also strong in Shadabala (5.77 Rupa) and in the Nakshatra of Mars (Dhanista). The native passed the examination of I.A.S. (Indian Administrative Service) in his first attempt during the Antardasa and Mahadasa of Saturn. 

Like Taurus Ascendant, Saturn is also a Yogakarakaplanet for the Libra Ascendant. However, here Saturn is getting into the sign of debilitation, and therefore the effects will get moderated. Against the favourable results of the 4th and the 5th house, the negative effects related to the 7th house shall also be borne in mind while predicting the results of the Saturn's Dasas. This aspect is taken up in yet another horoscope placed below.

Notes: Results of the Antardasa of Venus in the Mahadasa of Saturn have been appreciated in all the classical works of the Astrology. According to 'Jataka Parijata', the native will receive love and affection from the relatives and public. He will also get warmth, monetary gains, mental happiness and all sorts of comforts will also be attained in this period. 

According to 'Phaladeepika', during this period the native gets comforts of his wife and friends and there will be accumulation of wealth from the agricultural field and import and export business. Native's reputation will spread. Although there is striking similarity in the ancient treatises, still one should delineate the results after great thoughts.

Trimsamsachart needs, to be analysed over here. 

In the Trimamsa chart, Saturn is in Gemini and Venus in Sagittarius signs. Jupiter is in the 8th house along with the Moon. The 8th house having the aspects of Rahu, Ketu and Mars and Mars being the lord of the 2nd house (Maraka). The lord of Timsamsa is in the 8th house which stands afflicted and would deliver malefic effects. The Moolatrikona sign has also gone in the 8th house thereby afflicting Venus as well. Saturn, Mahadasa lord and also lord of the 12th house are at mutual aspects with Antardasa lord Venus. Hence, this combination delivered its malefic results in the sub-period of Venus during the main period of Saturn.

42: If the Sun is the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house, it will cause physical distress. For mitigating the ill effects, the Sun God be worshipped. 

Notes: The results of the sub-period of the Sun in the main period of Saturn are generally not good, especially health, mental power, child's birth, education will get affected. If the Sun is the Ascendant lord, it will certainly render adverse effects relating to the health of the native whether the Sun has any connection with the Saturn or not or placed in any of the houses from each other.

61-62: If Mars is the lord of the 7th or the 8th house or placed in the 2nd house, there will be danger of untimely death, different kind of distresses and losses. Offering oblations into fire (रेगम) will mitigate the ill effects. By giving buffalo in charity, all types of afflictions will get alleviated. 

Notes : Saturn and Mars, both are malefic planets and their combined influence on any house is considered quite unfavourable. The maleficence is of three kinds. Firstly, the house hourbouring these planets are receiving their combined effects, the body part represented by that house will become injury or disease prone. Secondly, the person connected to such house will face danger to his life. Suppose there is a combined affliction to the 4th house, the mother of the native will get harmed. Thirdly, placement of this afflicted house at 8th position from any house will affect the longevity of a person signified by that house. Let us take that both Mars and Saturn are posited in the 2nd house which is 8th from the 7th house (wife) and in that event, the 

longevity of the wife of the native will get affected. 

Besides, the results of the Dasa and Antardasa of Saturn and Mars respectively are similar to that of the Antardasa of the lord of the house in which both these planets are placed.

If Mercury be in the sign of debilitation or in the Trik houses (6/8/12) or conjoined with or aspected by the malefic planets, it will cause loss of wealth, crops and animals, opposition from co-borns, possibility of disease like shooting abdomen pains; anxiety over official works etc.

In the birth chart, Mercury is the lord of Ascendant and the 4th house and posited in the 2nd house alongwith Mars and Ketu. As it is a known fact that for Gemini Ascendant, the maleficence of Mars gets intensified because it acquires the lordship of the 6th and the 11th houses and Sage Parasara has described the 3rd, the 6th and the 11th houses as malefic houses. The 6th house signifies the disease and injuries and 11th being the 6th from the 6th house also acquires the same significance. Infact, Mars itself is the significator of accidents and injuries. Ketu is also known for delivering results like Mars. All these three planets are located in the death inflicting house (मावर्ति कृत्ति). Here Mercury represents body (Ascendant lord) vehicle and land (the 4th house lord). 

The Antardasa of Mercury in the Mahadasa of Mercury operated between 8-12-1988 and 7-5-1991 and during this period, the native purchased a piece of land which was under dispute and this fact was not known to him. The opposite party murdered the native around the same time while he was travelling in his vehicle. In the Navamsa chart, Mercury and Ketu together posited in the 7th house (Maraka house). Mars is the lord of the 8th house which gives violent death. The Trimsamsa chart also lends full support to this incident. 

The Ascendant of the Trimsamsa Chart is also Gemini. Here again Mercury and Mars are together and are located in the 10th house where Mercury is in the sign of debilitation and aspecting the 4th house. In this chart, the position of Saturn in the 6th house has also exerted its influence to further aggravate the situation. Here again Mars is the lord of 6th house (dispute) and Mars denotes land and violence.

6-8½: During the Antardasa of Ketu in the Mahadasa of Mercury, if Ketu is placed in Angle or Trine, conjoined with or aspected by the benefic planets or associated with the Yogakaraka planet or from the lord of the Mahadasa, if it is located at Angle or in the 11th house, it will confer results like bodily comforts. generation of abundant wealth, affection of brothers and friends; gain of animals, acquisition of wealth through travellings; educational attainments and opportunities for improvement of reputation; honourable meeting with the king; comforts of food and clothes in the beginning and also in the middle of the Antardasa. 

Notes: The Edition of Brihat Parasara Hora Sastra of Chaukhambha carried a word "प्रतिम्यावर" which means influx of excessive wealth. In other words, during the Ketu's Antardasa of the Mahadasa of Mercury, one becomes wealthy. Looking into the other results of the 

Shlokas, this effect is rather exaggerated one but both are right in their own sense, because during the ketu's Antardasa, no doubt there will be good inflow of money but heavy expenditure will also be there and money crunch will always be felt.

If the Sun is under the aspect of Mars, in the beginning of the Antardasa, there will be gain of property (land etc.) and if the Sun gets the aspect of the lord of the Ascendant, it will confer ample happiness, wealth, village (big estate), land and comfort of food and clothes etc.

In the Sagittarius Ascendant, the native attains a good status, and in the case of Taurus Ascendant, one gets popularity and felicitation, land, vehicle etc. and other material comforts. In other Ascendants, there would be mixed results (good or bad) even though the birth charts may be highly potential and held good promises. In the birth chart, the Moon being the lord of the 3rd house is posited in the 10th house. The 3rd house is attributed to commission Agent business etc. because firstly, in the natural horoscope, this house belongs to Mercury who does the work of "go-between". Secondly, 3rd house signifies the younger brother, helper, friends and right hand and through these, lot many works could be carried out. In other words, the 3rd house is that house which exerts for the Ascendant. 

Saturn, the lord of the 10th house (work place) is placed in the 5th house which belongs to Mercury and Mercury is posited in the 7th house (business). Since the job of the Commission Agent requires a sharp mind and promptness, the placement of Saturn in the 5th house is suitable for such laborious Job. In this nativity, Mercury itself is the lord of the 5th house (wisdom) and Mercury is otherwise also the signicator of intelligence. The native during the Mahadasa of Mercury and the Antardasa of the Moon 

(from 9-10-1984 to 9-3-1986) amassed sizeable wealth in the licensing business. The natives with Libra, Scorpio, Capricorn, Pisces Ascendants are also slated to attain beneficial results in this Antardasa. 

The Moon and Mercury also signify the children (िमिकु) and adolescent? (िमिकार) stages (अवस्थय) respectively. If the Mahadasalord Mercury forms 'Arista Yoga' with the Moon and there would be possibility of danger to the life of the native. A pertinent horoscope is analysed over here.

In the birth chart, Mars being the lord of the 4th house (land) and the 9th house (fortune) placed in the 9th house itself duly conjoined with Mercury and with the aspect of the Moon. The 6th house belongs to maternal uncle and 7th house therefrom (12th) will pertain to the wife of the uncle (Aunt). The lord of the 12th house is the Moon (here signifying the Aunt) aspects on the combination 

of Mars and Mercury. This uncle of the native did not have any issue. After ten years of the death of the uncle his Aunt was the only living person who remained on the maternal side. On her death, the native inherited this property during the Antardasa of Mars and in the Mahadasa of Mercury (from 5-8-1993 to 2-8-1994) and in the same period, the native shifted from his parental place to the palatial house of maternal uncle.

From the Chaturamsa Chart, the factor of fortune could be analysed. Gain through lottery certainly needs the predominance of a strong fortune because in speculation, fortune has to play much greater role and as such the element of the 9th house (प्रति कृधान) is also required. In this chart, Rahu again is posited in the 11th house and in Aquarius sign which is very beneficial for Rahu because in Chapter 48 of Parasara Shloka 157, it is said that Rahu is the lord of Aquarius sign. The other intrinsic factor of the horoscope is that Rahu is placed in the 11th house from the lord of Mahadasa (Mercury) and Karaka of fortune Jupiter is posited in its own sign and in the 9th house (fortune) alongwith Ascendant of the Chaturamsa Mars. For Lottery, this is the most suitable and benefic combination.

Notes: Sage Parasara revealed the following situations as auspicious: 

i) Placement of Ketu in Angle or Trineduly conjoined with the lord of the Ascendant. 

ii) In Carjjunction with the lord of the 4th house, if Ketu is located in the 11th house. 

iii) When Ketugets conjoined with the lord of the 9th orthe 10th house. 

Ketu's association with the planet in its own sign and located in an auspicious house will also bring benefic results. In this situation, Ketu will also give by and large good results in its Mahadasa. With these maxims of Sage Parasara in view, a horoscope is analysed over here.

During this period the native experienced all such results as contained in Shloka 1 and 2. 

Ketu in the 2nd house does not promise much expectations but in the 2nd house, if Ketu conjoined with the lord of the 2nd house, it will generate good amount of wealth. If the 2nd house suffers from a debilitated planet, particularly the debilitated lord of the Ascendant or with malefic planets, it will cause the possibility of physical distress. This theory is well explained in a horoscope cited over here.

Ketu is situated in the 2nd house of the birth chart along with Saturn, the lord of the 2nd house and Jupiter who is the lord of the Ascendant but is in its sign of debilitation. The fall of Jupiter as the Ascendant lord in the 2nd house, manifests unhealthy thinkings and combining with Rahu or Ketu in this state, will prove harmful for the body (health) of the native. In this illustration, Ketu, Saturn and Jupiter are casting a combined effect on the 2nd house which signifies the wealth and death inflicting house (Markesha) and placement of the debilitated Ascendant lord (self-body) over there shows that the effect will be more inclined towards 'Markesha' and would act against its other traits. Thus it will enhance the propensity of Markesha. Therefore, position of Ketu in the 2nd house will certainly cause serious bodily distress. In fact, this exactly had happened with the native. During 

Ketu's Mahadasa and the Antardasa of Ketu (from 28.2.1979 to 27.7.1979), the native had undergone trauma of terrible sickness.

In the instant horoscope, Rahu is placed in the 8th house from the Ascendant and from there the 2nd house is under the aspect. During the Antardasa of Rahu (from 28.11.92 to 16.12.1993), the native lostcash and ornaments worth twolakhs of rupees (two hundred thousand) in a burglary. This case of theft has never been traced out. As a mattar of fact, the placement of Rahu in the 8th house generally cause theft of this nature only.

In the birth chart, Ketu is placed in the sign of Saturn who is the lord of the 9th, (fortune) and the 10th (work place) houses. Saturn is also connected with Mars (lord of the 7th and the 12th houses). Since Ketu always moves backward, it does bring change. Saturn itself is in retrogression in the nativity. Therefore, in the Antardasa of Saturn of the Mahadasa of Ketu (from 24-7-1978 to 3-9-1979) the native has to change his business. Saturn is in the Ascendant and placed at Trine from Ketu and as such, this period had the potential of delivering success, right from the beginning.

Mercury in the nativity is the lord of the Ascendant and is at 6th place from the Mahadasa lord Ketu alongwith the Sun and Venus duly aspected by Jupiter. Mercury, in a way, is representing the Ascendant because of its Moolatrikona sign. Besides, lord of the 2nd and the 7th houses Venus and Jupiter are respectively in conjunction and in aspect with Mercury. The Sun, is also conjoining the Antardasa lord Mercury who owns the 12th house. 

The Mahadasa lord Ketu is placed in the Ascendant (self body) and the Antardasa lord Mercury is seriously afflicted and is placed at 6th position from Ketu and also owns the Ascendant. Therefore, during the Mahadasa of Ketuin the Antardasa of Mercury which operated between 25-1-1992 and 21-1-1993, the native had a great fall from the 2nd storey of a house and had remained under 'coma' for over a month. He suffered multiple injuries on his entire body.

9-10: If Venus is posited in the Trik houses (6,8,12) and having conjunction or aspect of the malefic planets, it will bring about cruel effects like, fear of theft and injuries; public at large be in distress, general resentment amongst the officials of the kings' court (persons under command), destruction of co-borns, distress of wife, children etc.

11: If Venus acquires the lordship of the 2nd or the 7th house, it will cause death in its Antardasa. For the alleviation of the evil effects, the Japa (राग) of Goddess Durga be undertaken and cow be given in charity. 

Notes: In accordance to the other classical works on the subject such as Dashaphala Durpana (रागन्दिका रूधान), during the Antardasa of Venus of its Mahadasa, the native begets gems, damsel, costly clothes, ornaments. In this Antardasa it is generally seen that the native gets more inclined towards artistic things and would also indulge in all sorts of pleasurable and lascivious activities. If Venus is strong, it will manifest refinements in the native who becomes more composed and devotes most of his time in reading and listening to religious scriptures and discourses, giving charities and prefers the company of devout persons. In this period, the business like financing, storage or warehousing, consumer goods (basically food products), automobiles, luxurious items would thrive very well. This however, would greatly depend upon the influence of the other planets over Venus. 

In case Venus is weak in the nativity, it will predominantly cause phlegmatic diseases, uneasiness, quarrel and disputes in the family, ailments to wife, sluggishness in the business due to poor transactions or paucity of funds. 

Amongst the death inflicting planets (मान्देयँ रैग), Venus and Jupiter are at the top of the list and if Venus acquires the ownership of the 2nd or the 7th house in the nativity and also the affliction of unmalefic planets or in combustion, it will gain the propensity of inflicting death during its subperiod. 

There appears to be some kind of contradiction between the 

Shlokas 7 and 8 and Shlokas 9 and 10. According to Shlokas 7/8, Venus produces favourable results if situated in the Upachaya houses (3,6,10,11) and at the same time Shlokas 8/10 say that Venus is considered inauspicious in the Trik houses (6,8,12). Here only the 6th house is common among them. As per our experience, placement of planets in the 6th house is not good but the results of the planet (Venus), whether good or bad, would mainly depend upon the type of business or work being pursued by the native. 

If Venus being the lord of the 10th house and posited in the 6th house and the native is a doctor, in which case the prosperity relating to his profession would turn out to be good. In the same manner, the placement of the 10th house lord, Venus in the 8th house would certainly cause excellent results in the business of leather goods, ivory or antique items. Further, Venus as a lord of the 10th house, if positioned in the 12th house and duly conjunct with the 12th house lord, it would boost up the import and export business. These contentions are quite illustrative in the following horoscope.

16-18: Placement of the Sun in the Trik houses (6,8,12), in the sign of debilitation or in malefic divisions (Vargas), will bring forth fever, mental anguish and quarrel with the co-borns; use of unpalatable language every day; discomfort to father and loss of brother; opposition in the assembly (court) of the King; obstruction from snake; lurking fear in the family (home); possibility of different kinds of diseases; destruction of house and agricultural land.

19: Should the Sun be the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house, the other planets will impose obstructions. For the alleviation of this affliction, the Sun God be worshipped. 

Notes: The Sun and Venus are not friendly to each other and it is for this very reason, their combination would cause confrontation with the relatives, such as, co-parceners or officials and the administrators of the king (Government) which is quite natural. Having attained the sign of debilitation or the lordship of inauspicious houses, the Sun would certainly render unfavourable results. However, if both these planets are related to the same incidents or events of the life, the effects of such incident would get intensified. For example, if the Sun is the lord of the 10th house and Venus in conjunction with the Sun is posited in a benefic house, there would definitely be good gains in the business during the major and the sub-period of their planets, because Venus is the signicator of wealth and magnificence and in the natural horoscope, it represents the house of business (the 7th house). Incidentally, if both the planets happen to be in the Trik 

houses (6,8,12), it would certainly bring reverses in the business activities. Keeping this angle in view, a horoscope is taken up for discussions.

The birth chart of Scorpio Ascendant in which Venus is the lord of the 2nd house (business) and the 12th house (Import and export). This Venus in conjunction with the Sun, lord of the 10th house (efforts and workplace) is placed in the Ascendant alongwith the 11th lord (gain) Mercury. Further, the Sun is in its own Navamsa. In the birth chart, Mercury apart from being the lord of the 11th house also owns the 8th house which signifies metal and minerals. In the Antardasa of the Sun and the Mahadasa of Venus (14-3-1983 to 13-3-1984), the native started export of metallic items and today the native is quite satisfied over his performance.

51: Should Jupiter be the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house, it will cause bodily pains. Japa of Mrityunjaya be performed to ward off the evil effects. 

Notes: It is stated earlier that Venus and Jupiter are the first grade 'Marakas' planets (death inflicting planets). Jupiter acquires the propensity of killing when it becomes the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house in the nativity. It has also been explained in one of the preceding notes that the placement of 'Maraka' planet in an inauspicious house is very bad and in this situation, it will spring into action as Marakesha. In the appended horoscope although Jupiter has the lordship of the 2nd house, it performs the functions of the 5th house instead of the 2nd house and thus would render benefit results of a Trinal lord.

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/98eb38fe-377d-48a5-80fa-2a151abaebaa/964e82bbe876c45b8d61bd3409c7a0d0428d9ef24e4b7efc01e67322134bff8d.jpg)


The 2nd lord Jupiter is placed in the 11th house (gains) along with 7th Lord Venus (Markesha). In the Antardasa of Jupiter of the Mahadasa of Venus, which came into play between 5-8-1991 and 5-4-1994, the native had been to foreign country for higher education and improving his prospects. For ascertaining a particular event, lot depends upon the planet forming its connections with the lord of the houses. In this horoscope, the significator of education and the lord of the 5th house (education) Jupiter having a conjunction with the 12th lord Venus (12th house signifies exist) and are posited in the 11th house (achievement). Both these planets are also aspecting the 5th house. This presents a vivid picture of achievement (11th house) of foreign (12th house) education (5th house) and gains therefrom. 

The underlying idea of this illustration is that one should not always take the pessimistic view of these aphorisms and one must look into the brighter side as well. In other words, merely being the lord of the 2nd 

of exaltation, own sign, in Kendras (Angles) or Trikonas (Trines) and conjoined with the benefic planets, full moon, powerful and accompanied by the lord of the 10th, the 9th or the 4th house, during the Dasa of the Moon, beginning till the end, happiness, enjoyment, auspiciousness would prevail. Gain in wealth and agriculture produce, many auspicious ceremonies at home, comforts of conveyance, meeting with the king, success at works, blessing of goddess Laxami enhancement of fortune through Royalty and friends and state of extreme enjoyment are achieved. Acquisition of conveyance and white garments, happiness of having a son, addition of cows in the house etc., are the other benefits native would reap during this period. 

If the Moon is posited in the 11th house and is also in her own sign or in the sign of exaltation, gain of wealth in its assorted forms, accretion in fortune, happiness and education and also Royal commendation are likely to be bestowed during this period. 

Notes: The Moon is Karaka of happiness. Therefore, Maharishi perceives state of extreme happiness in the auspicious and favourable positions of the Moon. In the natural horoscope, the Moon is also Karaka of vehicle (any kind of conveyance) and animals. Therefore, comforts of vehicles and (wealth of) cows is enhanced during this period. The Moon is also Karaka of 'Mare' (female horse) as such Rishi points out Ratha (chariot) though the tradition of chariot is no longer in existence in the modern age. The horse driven vehicle is a passenger carrier and hence it can be compared with the similar type of vehicle of the modern time. 

The Bombay's edition of this treatise, states that in the major period of the Moon, the results like, warmth of the mother, house, garden, tank etc., status in the society, elegant conveyance, marriage in the house and other related auspicious functions, success in business, accomplishment of venture, fortune uplift with the blessings of preceptor and friends and pitfall-gains are generally felt. 

The effects of the Moon's Dasa enunciated in the publication of M/s. Thakur Prashad & Sons are almost identical. Rise in the fortune (status) is an additional effect which it has recorded - along with one extra Shloka which states. 

foreign countries; loss of cattle, like cows, buffalos (female) etc. Should Satum be the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house, it will cause physical discomforts.

Aaparayu 1 1 

63-64: If Mercury is placed at the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house from the lord of the Mahadasa (Venus) or bereft of strength or under the aspect or conjoined with the malefic planet, its will cause destruction of cattle; residing in the house of other person; mental uneasiness; possibly of loss in business and other activities. These effects undoubtedly will occur. 

gukayadai gomn prakm mghayk 

安

Sukhupamahadhyaiaahayoogga  Teohyipiai G 

Lahoyogayarahaarayd Vaguushaehak Jyepetl 115 

65-66: In the beginning of the Antardasa, favourable results, in the middle, mediocre and towards the end, distress, disease, like gastric, fever due to cold be predicted. 

If Mercury be afflicted for being the lord of the 7th house, it will cause bodily distress. In order to ward off this affliction, Lord Vishu Saharsamama be recited. 

Notes: In the settings of Mercury's Antardasa in the Mahadasa of Venus, the Ascendants of Taurus, Gemini, Virgo, Libra and Capricorn deliver benefic results in a full measure. Mercury in the Ascendant of Sagittarius and Pisces suffers from the 'Kedradipati Dosha' (maleficence being the lord of two Angular houses) and if Mercury duly situated in 'Maraka Sthana' (the 2nd or the 7th house) or in inauspicious houses and aspected or conjunct with the malefic planet, it may cause danger to life. A horoscope related to this very aspect is taken up for analysis. 

Example:75 

Data : Date of birth; 2/3-2-1949; Time of birth; 5-15 hrs.; 

Latitude; $28^{\circ} - 50^{\prime}$ (N); Longitude: $77^{\circ} - 49^{\prime}$ (E) 

Balance of Dasa at birth : Satum, 3 years, 8 months, 17 days. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/98eb38fe-377d-48a5-80fa-2a151abaebaa/0aff6de980af4097377dca1a81b7d0d73464f0f7fddef940f0baf7c778393da3.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/98eb38fe-377d-48a5-80fa-2a151abaebaa/67415a9ffdeacfcce40f1a1eb5bb572386805e0d5e93ce6c0d4c2710a4e14148.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/98eb38fe-377d-48a5-80fa-2a151abaebaa/108ff0174168504808513a3239812fa0100250c35da015bf1a493113ce57f3fb.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/98eb38fe-377d-48a5-80fa-2a151abaebaa/c0663546dc5a863a07daf35db8fac45416767565c2d11f84ec84ae3ba6117d32.jpg)


In the birth chart, Mercury is the lord of the 7th and the 10th houses and hence suffered from 'Kendradlipat Dosha'. Besides, it also inherits 'Maraka Dosha' for being the 7th house lord. Mars having the lordship of the 8th house also throws its aspects on the 7th house. Venus which is the lord of the 6th house is in deep combustion and also posited In the 2nd house which is also occupied by Saturn and the Sun. Again, Saturn is in the inimical sign of the Sun. Mercury is also in the Nakshatra of the Moon (Shravana) who is the lord of the 8th house. In the nativity, Mercury being the lord of 7th house and posited in the 2nd house with two malefic planets, gets deeply afflicted and hence acquires the propensity of 'Marakesha' or inflicting injuries to the native. 

In June' 1994, when the native was returning from office in a Jeep, his vehicle was hit by the another vehicle and he was very badly injured and had to struggle for his life. He remained on bed for several months and had a terrible agonising time. This all happened in the Antardasa of Mercury and the Mahadasa of Venus.

67-68: In the Antardasa of Ketu of the Mahadasa of Venus, if Ketu is in own or exalted sign or associated with the Yogakaraka planet or backed with the Sthana Bala (Positional strength), the beginning of the Antardasa will confer excessive benefic results; sweet with daily meals; great success in the business; increase of cows, buffalo etc.

70-72: If the Lord of the Antardasa is placed in the 6th of the 8th house from the lord of the Mahadasa or conjoined with the malefic planet, it will bring forth results like, danger from thieves, snake and injury; poor intellect, great fear, mental illness, mental 

agony, quarrels/disputes at work, urinary disease, expenditure due to various reasons, opposition from wife and children, journeys, failures in ventures.

73-74: If Ketu is the lord of the 2nd or the 7th house, it will cause bodily distress. Forthe alleviation of this affliction, Mrityunjaya Japa (रेम) be recited. Charity of goat will bring prosperity. With the propitiation of Venus, peace and happiness could be attained. 

# JyPraynntaahay: | 1

# Chapter - 63

# RESULTS OF THE PRATYANTARDASAS IN THE ANTARDASA OF PLANETS

Computation of the Pratyantardasa : 

Puyyuk 

Majolalvabvadhyayo: 

1: The Antardasa years of a planet be multiplied by the Mahadasa years of each planet separately and the product then be divided by 120 (total of the Mahadasas of all planets) the resultant will indicate the Pratyantardasa of each planet. 

Notes: The Pratyantardasa will invariably end up in terms of months and days or in some cases in days only. Therefore, the easy way of computation would be to convert the Antardasa into days and the steps embodied in Shloka 1 be followed. The resultant figure in this will be in days only which may again be reverted into months and days. Since most of the times, days figure would be infractions, its could as well be extended to Ghatl and Palas or Hours and Minutes if so desired. However, it is generally kept in roundfigure of day only. 

Example:76 

Let us take the computation of the Pratyantardasa of the Sun in the Antardasa and Mahadasa of the Sun. 

Mahadasa of the Sun 6 years 

AntardasaoftheSunin 

the Mahadasa of the Sun $= 0y3m18d = 108$ days 

Pratyantardasa of the Sun $= \frac{108 \times 6 = 5.4 \text{ days}}{120}$ 

5days,24Gh 

or 

5days,9hrs.,36mts. 

# Example:77

Suppose we need to find out the Pratyantardasa of Saturn in the Antardasa of Saturn and in the Mahadasa of Venus; it will work out as under: 

Mahadasa of Venus 20 years 

Antardasa of Saturn in 

theMahadasaof Venus $3y2m0d = 1140$ days 

Pratyantardasa of Satum $= 1140\times 19 = 180.5$ 

120 

6m0d30Gh. 

or 

6m0d12hrs. 

It may be noted that the first Pratyantardasa will always belong to the lord of the Antardasa followed by the normal Dasasequence of the Vimisottaridasasa system. The method ascribed in Shloka 1 could however, beformulised as under: 

# Formula:

Pratyantardasa = No. of days of the Antardasa x Mahadasa years 

120 

The computation of all the Pratyantar Dasas of planets is given in a tabular form as per Table 29. In the table, the period has be rounded off to the nearest day because in practice, the predictions, if made up to a day are more than satisfying. Working out these Dasas in terms of hours/minute or Ghatis/ Palas would serve not much purpose as it is a rare possibility to predict that precisely. However, those desirous of getting into the finer details, they can conveniently reach out to these figures with the use of the formula ibidem.

10: Pratyantardasa of VENUS in the Antardasa of the SUN - Steady life, little but stable gain, moderate happiness and prosperity etc. 

Notes: Apropos effects of the planets propounded by the Sage in the combinations of Antar and Pratyantar Dasas, are predominantly based on the signification of the planets. For example, in the Pratyantardasas of the Antardasa of the Sun, it is said that the native would suffer from 'headache' etc. If the same happened to be the lord of the Ascendant and being the significator of 'heat' (fiery nature), it would, no doubt, cause headache. 

The Sun has inherent quality of bestowing and also the nature of renunciation. Since the Sun signifies 'Soul', he has a direct exposure to the "Supreme Divine". Probably, it is on account of this very characteristic of the Sun, the Sage did not perceive lascivious results such as comforts of women, etc., in the Pratyantardasas of the Sun. This omission is more evident in the Pratyantardasa of Venus (reference Shloka-10). as Venus is otherwise known for delivering lustful and sensuous results. 

It may be noted that the results of the Pratyantardasa of the Moon in the Antardasa of the Sun such as excitement, quarrel, mental distress etc., are the predominant significations of the Moon. All these effects are related to mind. However, the results of the subsequent Pratyantardasas are directly connected with the very nature of each planet and the Sage adopted an identical pattern of description. 

However, in addition to these perceivable effects, embodied in these Shlokas, we have also to bear in mind the other important factors such as placement of the lord of the Pratyantardasa viz-a-viz the lords of the other Dasas up in the hierarchy in the nativity. Besides, the ownership of a particular house certainly has an imposing effect over the results depictable during the operation of the Pratyantardasa. In other words, one should perceive the results only after taking into account the ingredients like disposition of the lords of hierarchical Dasas in the hierarchy (Mahadasa, antardasa, Pratyantardasa and so on) i.e. their placement, conjunctions, ownership of houses, signification etc. As a matter of fact, the signification or the characteristic of the planets is a main force in delivering specific results and will also decide the timing of occurrence. 

Here is an example to ellucidate these facts: 

rituals for propitiatory measures for the alleviation of evil effects. 

CHAPTER 90 753-754 

# BIRTHS DURING BHADRA AND OTHER INAUSPICIOUSYOGAS :

Kinds of inauspicious Yogas producing evil effects and alleviatory measures to be adopted. 

CHAPTER 91 755-756 

# BIRTHS IN THE RELATIVES BIRTH NAKSHATRAS:

Evil effects caused by the births in the Nakshatras of brother and parents and alleviatory measures to ward off such evil effects. 

CHAPTER 92 757-760 

# PROPRIITION OF PLANETS FOR BIRTHS DURING SOLAR INGRESS (SANKRANTI).

Names of solar ingress falling on the week days causing affliction. Prescribed rituals for propitiatory measures to mitigate the ill effects. 

CHAPTER 93 761-763 

# PROPRIATION OF PLANETS FOR BIRTHS DURING ECLIPSES:

Evil effects of the births during the solar or lunar eclipses explained. Method of propitation for the alleviation of such afflictions. 

CHAPTER 94 764-766 

# PROPRIATION OF PLANETS FOR BIRTHS DURING GANDANTA:

Three types of Gandanta namely : Tithi, Nakshatra and Ascendant (Lagna) and there evil effects. Method of propitiation to mitigate such affications. 

CHAPTER 95 767-770 

# PROPITIATION OF PLANETS FOR BIRTHS FOR BIRTHSDURING ABHUKTA MOOLA :

Evil effects of the births during Abhukta Moola (Jyesta and Moola Gandanta) described. Propitiatory measures and religious rituals to get such affliction alleviated. 

CHAPTER 96 771-773 

# PROPITIATION OF PLANETS FOR BIRTHS DURING JYESHTAGANDANTA :

Evil effects of the births during Jyeshta Gandanta. Method of propitiation

Notes: The lord of the house has a great importance in showing the results during the Pratyantardasa as has been explained in a greater detail in the preceding note. Here is an example of the Pratyantardasa of Mars in the Antardasa of the Moon to show the efficacy of the revelation. 

# Example:79

Data: Date of birth 28-1-1956; time of birth 9-16 hrs (IST) 

Latitude $28^{\circ} - 24'$ (N); Longitude: $77^{\circ} - 54'$ (E) 

Balance of Dasa at birth: Mercury 10 years, 8 months, 3 days. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/98eb38fe-377d-48a5-80fa-2a151abaebaa/f0a1e0e86931be02e395fcf177f435bd2056fd88149037f35f3e14a1f1ccab37.jpg)


<table><tr><td></td><td></td><td>Kat</td><td></td></tr><tr><td>Ven</td><td rowspan="2" colspan="2">Birth Chart</td><td>Moon</td></tr><tr><td>Mer Sun</td><td>Jup</td></tr><tr><td></td><td>Mar Rah Sat</td><td></td><td></td></tr></table>

This lady of nativity gave birth to a son, after a very long time, in the Mahadasa of the Sun, the Antardasa of the Moon and the Pratyantardasa of Mars. The Sun is the lord of the 5th house in the natural horoscope and is also the Karaka of son comparable to Jupiter. The Moon in whose Antardasa the birth of a child took place, is the lord of the 5th house in the birth chart and posited therein with direct aspects of the Sun. Similarly Mars owns the 9th house and both these houses (5th and 9th) have the capacity of producing a child. The Pratyantardasa of Mars fell between 24.2.1994 and 4.3.1994. It may thus be seen that for the fructification of a particular result, the coherence, compatibility and auspicious connections between the lords of all these three Dasas are absolutely necessary.

39: Pratyantardasa of SATURN in the Antardasa of JUPITER. Gain of cows, land and gold, provision of all sorts of comfort rendering goods, accumulation (storage) of food grains and beverages (drinking material i.e. water etc.). 

Notes: It is generally seen that if Jupiter and Saturn are the lord of the 7th or the 6th house and if they are conjunct or some connection is formed between them, the native gets imprisonment on account of wife or some woman. The incident would normally take place in the Antardasa of Jupiter and Pratyantardasa of Saturn or Visa-versa. In this respect, the succeeding horoscope maybe focussed. 

# Example:80

Data: Date of birth, 24.1.1962; Time of birth, 23-30 hrs (IST) 

Latitude $28^{\circ} - 24^{\prime}$ (N); Longitude $77^{\circ} - 54$ (E) 

Balance of Dasa at birth: Venus 3 years, 4 months, 6 days. 

![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/98eb38fe-377d-48a5-80fa-2a151abaebaa/5be7b01ff87e2f81c2d8cff8a430f51996c028716c368ce6f9ed4d75a48e37ac.jpg)

In the birth chart, the lord of the 7th house (wife) the lord of the 6th house are together in the 5th house. In the Mahadasa of Rahu and Antardasa of Jupiter which operated between 12.2.1991 and 6.7.1993, the native got married. When the Pratyantardasa of Saturn arrived in the Antardasa of the Jupiter i.e. from 7.6.1991 to 24.10.1991, they got divorced but before the marriage had actually been dissolved, the native and his mother had been imprisoned on the basis of some false complaint from his wife.

# Example:81

Data: Date of birth, 8/9-10-1954; Time of birth 1-30 hrs (IST) Latitude: $29^{\circ}$ -23' (N); Longitude: $78^{\circ}$ -11' (E) Balance of Dasa at birth : Mars 0 year-7 months-14 days.

Notes: Mercury promptly delivers its results. In its Antardasa, if the Pratyantardasa of the Moon or Mars falls, the effects will be still faster. Besides, Mercury also confers results of the house it holds, the ownership at an early age of the native. For example, if Mercury is the lord of the 10th house and duly strong, the native will get into service or business at a young age as may be seen in the appended horoscope. 


Example:82


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/98eb38fe-377d-48a5-80fa-2a151abaebaa/07ffb9ea1282e5ef4b7bbc413887384853cddd1daafdffdd52a7ec25ece77b68.jpg)


![image](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2026-04-29/98eb38fe-377d-48a5-80fa-2a151abaebaa/9b76b8f7e771209f805b3d02e24e03fb747bd0f7f993e8ebf9c79aa624c6540a.jpg)


Data: Date of birth 22-9-1957; Time of birth 14-10 hrs (IST) 

Place of birth : Delhi 

Balance of Dasaat birth: Venus 17 years, 1 month, 15 days: 

This native got commission In the Army during the Mahadasa of the Sun, Antardasa of Mercury and Pratyantardasa of Mars. For analysing these 

results, we have to first of all see whether there is any promise of service that too in the military, in the horoscope of the native or not. 

There is exchange between the lords of the 9th and the 10th houses. Mars being the signicator of valour, courage (military like qualities) is posited in the 10th house (work place) duly supported by Jupiter in the same house. Therefore, symptom of military service are very much present in the birthchart. Now, we have to see the required combinations for the government service. 

The aspect could be ascertained through involvement of lords and the houses viz., 10th 9th and Karakas for government and also for this particular type of service. Here Mercury and the Sun are the lords of 10th and 9th houses respectively. Besides, the lords of the same houses in the natural horoscope are Jupiter and Saturn. The Karaka for Government Service is the Sun while Karaka for this specific service is Mars. 

Now the fructification of this results is quite perceptible through these combinations. The native got commissioned in the Army in the Mahadasa of the Sun (lord of 9th house and karaka for service) and in the Pratyantar of Mars (represents militarytraits) which operated between 28-1-1979 and 15-2-1979. Therefore, the results are quite compatible with the classical aphorisms.
